item.title: Unboxing Acer Revo Box RB102 Quad-Core Mini PC: Small but Fully Equipped, A Low-Power Office Machine Choice
item.itunes:title: Unboxing Acer Revo Box RB102 Quad-Core Mini PC: Small but Fully Equipped, A Low-Power Office Machine Choice
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
Recently, Fox has been looking for a minimalist office computer that can also double as a server for specific functions.

It should be affordable, low in power consumption, and, in short, small, elegant, and energy-efficient.

Although Taiwan doesn’t lack electricity, I’m still very short on cash ~ Keeping my wallet happy and meeting my needs is crucial.

Some netizens might say the performance is poor, but it’s meant to be a minimalist office and multimedia machine, after all~~

Coincidentally, Acer’s mini PC series was on sale during Double 11, so we got this one:

Acer Revo Box RB102 Quad-Core Mini PC

 Testing and unboxing ~ Hopefully, it meets our simple expectations.

 

Now let’s get started ~ Following the traditional routine.

The outer packaging is very simple, just a plain kraft paper box.

 

Before unboxing, let’s take a look at the specs from the official website:

  • Operating System: Windows 11 Pro
  • Processor: Intel® Celeron N100
  • Memory: 4GB*1 DDR4
  • Storage: 128G M.2 SSD
  • Wireless Network: 802.11 ax/ac/a/b/g/n, Wi-Fi 6
  • Bluetooth: Bluetooth® 5.2

Additionally, the official website lists the product features:

★ Lightweight, less than 1L in volume and less than 1kg in weight, easy to carry
★ Supports up to three monitors simultaneously, with up to 8K resolution
★ Compatible with VESA mounts for wall-hanging behind a monitor, saving space
★ 3-year warranty with on-site pickup and delivery, buy with confidence, use with peace of mind!

For a small PC, the ability to output to three monitors is quite impressive.

However, the performance is probably just adequate, so you can’t expect too much.

Now, let’s unbox. Upon opening, the first thing you see is the main unit itself.

 

A simple manual or warranty information is included.

 

The contents are straightforward: the main unit, a small power adapter, and a mounting bracket to secure it behind a monitor.

 

The power adapter is really small, with a maximum power output of just 36W.

 

The front of the main unit has a power button and an audio output port.

What’s impressive is the abundance of USB ports:

It includes two USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A ports and one USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C port.

The USB-C port can also be used to connect an external monitor.

 

The rear interface, aside from the power connector, also includes two USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A ports.

It also has HDMI and DisplayPort, plus a rare feature for mini PCs: dual RJ-45 network ports.

 

Next up is the teardown time.

The entire top and bottom cover of this machine are made of plastic.

Upon opening, you can see a small fan component.

It looks like there’s space to add a 2.5-inch hard drive.

Lifting the top cover reveals the SSD covered with thermal pads and a single SO-DIMM memory slot.

The factory-installed RAM is 4GB.

Fox sincerely advises you ~ Go buy a 16GB stick to upgrade it!!!

 

This machine is full of Chinese components.

The memory is from a Chinese brand, Vostron.

 

Even the SSD is from a Chinese brand, FORESEE (Longsys).

Specs: PCIe Gen3x4 NVMe 1.2.

It’s basically just adequate.

No wonder the whole machine is so affordable—there’s a reason for it.

 

Below the SSD is the wireless network card, model Intel AX101 NGW.

Thankfully, they didn’t cut costs by using an MTK card.

 

The back of the CPU uses a large heatsink with a fanless design.

Although the Intel® Celeron N100 supports low-power mode...

There’s still some concern about overheating.

 

Anyway, Fox went ahead and started using it.

Well... first impressions came quickly—Editor Old G and Fox couldn’t stand the lag when opening multiple web pages.

We immediately upgraded the RAM to 16GB, and the experience became much smoother.

With this, most office tasks and multimedia playback are manageable ~ It can also handle a mail server and soft router without issues.

 

However, during multitasking, although some claim the N100’s performance is comparable to an i5-7400,

with the overall power consumption capped at 36W, the CPU runs at a low frequency of no more than 1.5 GHz.

Despite the N100’s theoretical max clock speed of 3.40 GHz, this isn’t achievable on the Revo Box RB102.

So, the actual experience is somewhat different.

Even with low-power operation, due to the passive cooling design, the CPU temperature can still rise high enough to require throttling in poorly ventilated environments.

If you’re concerned about high operating temperatures, a laptop cooling pad will be your good friend.

 

That’s the quick unboxing, for reference to anyone interested in purchasing.

How to Fix the Screen Freeze Issue on ASRock Deskmini 110 

How to Resolve Blue Screen Issues on ASUS PCs After Updating Drivers (Stop Code: Inaccessible Boot Device)

Click here to proceed or scan the QR CODE

Want to chat with us? Please join Foolish Fox’s Fan Page

With this, most office tasks and multimedia playback are manageable ~ It can also handle a mail server and soft router without issues.

 

However, during multitasking, although some claim the N100’s performance is comparable to an i5-7400,

with the overall power consumption capped at 36W, the CPU runs at a low frequency of no more than 1.5 GHz.

Despite the N100’s theoretical max clock speed of 3.40 GHz, this isn’t achievable on the Revo Box RB102.

So, the actual experience is somewhat different.

Even with low-power operation, due to the passive cooling design, the CPU temperature can still rise high enough to require throttling in poorly ventilated environments.

If you’re concerned about high operating temperatures, a laptop cooling pad will be your good friend.

 

That’s the quick unboxing, for reference to anyone interested in purchasing.

How to Fix the Screen Freeze Issue on ASRock Deskmini 110 

How to Resolve Blue Screen Issues on ASUS PCs After Updating Drivers (Stop Code: Inaccessible Boot Device) 

ASUS ExpertCenter D9 (D901MDR) Professional Commercial Desktop 2024 Model - Better Cooling, More Robust Structure, Quick Unboxing and Chat

item.title: ASUS RT-AX82U 韌體 3.0.0.4.388.25035 上架 更新內容說明
item.itunes:title: ASUS RT-AX82U 韌體 3.0.0.4.388.25035 上架 更新內容說明
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
這次的更新其實也是在修正 5G 頻段連線的問題

想詳細了解的可以看這篇

解決華碩無線路由器對 IoT 設備 5G 頻道降速與 AiMesh 無線回程突然失效的方法

在開始之前~還不認識這部無限路由器的朋友可以看一下底下的開箱文

ASUS 無線路由器 RT-AX82U 簡單架設教學與開箱小聊

現在有黑色的版本可以買讓我頗為羨慕

如果讓我再買一次的話，我會想買黑色版 !!!!

回到這次大家所收到的更新

版本號為 3.0.0.4.388.25035

這個版本號只能手動下載更新

因為如果從後台自動更新，被刷進來的居然是 3.0.0.4.388.25030

 

所以這邊大家要特別注意一下

3.0.0.4.388.25035 的更新內容為

改善與部分IoT裝置的相容性問題

如果您想要手動下載更新，可於底下連結下載

RT-AX82U https://dlcdnets.asus.com/pub/ASUS/wireless/RT-AX82U/FW_RT_AX82U_300438825035.zip?model=RT-AX82U

手動更新教學如下 (請注意更新時要認對新版本與路由器型號名)

下載 ZIP 檔後解壓縮在手動上傳便可，如果您跟我一樣在 AiMesh 系統中手動更新節點軔體則請跟著以下步驟走

系統管理 > 軔體更新

在 AiMesh 節點管理中點選手動軔體更新中的 上傳

(下圖中因為我更新完成才截圖，所以目前版本更最新版本變一樣了)

 

接下來會跳出準備被更新的路由器後台登入畫面~登入之後就會出現手動更新頁

點選 上傳

 

選擇你剛剛下載的新軔體 (請一定要選對型號，另外 AC68U = AC66U+ B1)

 

然後保持被更新的路由器不斷電且與上傳檔案的電腦之間線路暢通，並靜待更新完成

 

100% 之後就可以使用了，但狐仔個人習慣是確定更新完成後會再重新啟動無線路由器一次

以上報告完畢，祝大家更新順利

KYMCO RTS R 165 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

Windows 10 五月更新 KB5058379 安裝後可能觸發 BitLocker 回復或跳出 BSOD 畫面

Honda Civic e:HEV 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

Unboxing ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 AX7800 Mesh Wi-Fi 6 Tri-band Commercial Wireless Router Commercial Router for Opening Stores or Multi-SSID Needs

Ford Kuga MK3.5 1.5T Active 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

item.title: KYMCO RTS R 165 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
item.itunes:title: KYMCO RTS R 165 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
長期追蹤我這邊的車輛使用紀錄的朋友曾經問過我一個問題

你追蹤了這麼多型號的汽車

那何時要追蹤機車呢 ???? 說著說著 ~ 這不就來了嗎 ???

我們的鞭輯 老G 買了新機車 KYMCO RTS R 165

大家可以先看他的開箱

KYMCO RTS R 165 新世代水冷超級街跑 速克達 光陽吹起反攻速高階速克達市場號角的力作 開箱

規矩還是照舊 ~ 因為這裡只紀錄長期使用的，所以新車購入部份的花費就讓它放水流吧(大誤)

我們把注意力放在加了多少油與一些事後的改裝、保養、保險

開始之前大家要知道

根據光陽的官方宣告

平均油耗為 42.4 KM/L

 

 

現在我們正式來囉 ~ 我們把所有的紀錄流水帳表格化後放在雲端了

(點我前往)

因為在正式來之前，老G沒有把每一次加油紀錄好好拍照下來

所以我們就把這邊開始之前的紀錄一次打包起來總計在此

接下來就會開始好好的紀錄啦

 

04/11

開始紀錄，在入手這部車後到這個時間點

老 G 還衝了一趟南橫 ~~~ 所以油耗會蠻有趣的

到目前為止

加油 67.86 L / 2024 元

加油記錄油耗 30.865 km/L

加油總油耗 30.865 km/L

 

從南橫之回來之後的圖像更新記錄從 4/19 開始

這段時間大部分就台南市區內的通勤紀錄

4/19

加油 4.97 L / 147 元

總里程 2169 km

加油記錄油耗 27.81 km/L

 

4/20

加油 2.73 L / 78 元

總里程 2271 km

加油記錄油耗 37.36 km/L

前次加油完後跑了趟高雄仁武去換裝 MD 摩德 RTS 專用坐墊，來改善長途屁屁痛的問題

隔天要前往嘉義布袋參加 KYMCO 快閃車聚，順便灌入之前參加車聚獲得的汽油精

 

  

4/20

加油 3.40 L / 97 元

總里程 2396 km

加油記錄油耗 36.76 km/L

這桶油紀錄了走 台17 線 從台南市區前往布袋漁港參加 KYMCO RTS 快閃車聚的長途旅程

來回大約 97km 左右

整體上來說，其實長途表現都不錯，就是市區的油耗不好看

 

4/27

加油 4.85 L / 141 元

總里程 2530 km

加油記錄油耗 27.63 km/L

  

5/03

加油 5.04 L / 146 元

總里程 2673 km

加油記錄油耗 28.37 km/L

 

5/09

加油 4.52 L / 126 元

總里程 2803 km

加油記錄油耗 28.76 km/L

 

 

5/15

加油 5.21 L / 140 元

總里程 2952 km

加油記錄油耗 28.60 km/L

 

 

持續更新中

如果您想贊助提神良方，鼓勵編輯部更努力 (低銷 50)

可以點我前往 或是掃 QR CODE

想要跟我們聊天，請加入傻瓜狐狸的粉絲團

傻瓜狐狸的狐言亂語

原文發表於傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品
item.description:
長期追蹤我這邊的車輛使用紀錄的朋友曾經問過我一個問題

你追蹤了這麼多型號的汽車

那何時要追蹤機車呢 ???? 說著說著 ~ 這不就來了嗎 ???

我們的鞭輯 老G 買了新機車 KYMCO RTS R 165

大家可以先看他的開箱

KYMCO RTS R 165 新世代水冷超級街跑 速克達 光陽吹起反攻速高階速克達市場號角的力作 開箱

規矩還是照舊 ~ 因為這裡只紀錄長期使用的，所以新車購入部份的花費就讓它放水流吧(大誤)

我們把注意力放在加了多少油與一些事後的改裝、保養、保險

開始之前大家要知道

根據光陽的官方宣告

平均油耗為 42.4 KM/L

 

 

現在我們正式來囉 ~ 我們把所有的紀錄流水帳表格化後放在雲端了

(點我前往)

因為在正式來之前，老G沒有把每一次加油紀錄好好拍照下來

所以我們就把這邊開始之前的紀錄一次打包起來總計在此

加油記錄油耗 27.81 km/L

 

4/20

加油 2.73 L / 78 元

總里程 2271 km

加油記錄油耗 37.36 km/L

前次加油完後跑了趟高雄仁武去換裝 MD 摩德 RTS 專用坐墊，來改善長途屁屁痛的問題

隔天要前往嘉義布袋參加 KYMCO 快閃車聚，順便灌入之前參加車聚獲得的汽油精

 

  

4/20

加油 3.40 L / 97 元

總里程 2396 km

加油記錄油耗 36.76 km/L

這桶油紀錄了走 台17 線 從台南市區前往布袋漁港參加 KYMCO RTS 快閃車聚的長途旅程

來回大約 97km 左右

整體上來說，其實長途表現都不錯，就是市區的油耗不好看

 

4/27

加油 4.85 L / 141 元

總里程 2530 km

加油記錄油耗 27.63 km/L

  

5/03

加油 5.04 L / 146 元

總里程 2673 km

加油記錄油耗 28.37 km/L

 

5/09

加油 4.52 L / 126 元

總里程 2803 km

加油記錄油耗 28.76 km/L

 

 

5/15

加油 5.21 L / 140 元

總里程 2952 km

加油記錄油耗 28.60 km/L

 

 

持續更新中

item.title: Windows 10 五月更新 KB5058379 安裝後可能觸發 BitLocker 回復或跳出 BSOD 畫面
item.itunes:title: Windows 10 五月更新 KB5058379 安裝後可能觸發 BitLocker 回復或跳出 BSOD 畫面
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
很久沒這個狀況了 ~~~ 這個月的累積更新才剛推出就出現大問題啦 !

Windows 10 的更新 KB5058379

(Windows 10 22H2 / 21H2 五月安全性更新 KB5058379 更新內容整理)

在安裝更新後出現系統無法開機、藍畫面（BSOD）以及被強制要求輸入 BitLocker 回復金鑰的情況

 

首先要告訴大家的是 ~ 這問題不會發生在所有的 WIN10 系統上

更正確的來說 ~ 多數人是不會遇到這問題的

如果因為安裝 KB5058379 後問題被觸發了

那麼你會發現系統會先進入 BSOD 的畫面 (藍畫面) 後開始重開機

重開機後會觸發 BitLocker 加密驅動器保護

導致部分用戶在重開機後直接進入 BitLocker 回復模式

大多數根本沒有備份或存取金鑰，進而導致系統被鎖死

或是不斷的進入 BSOD 後重開機 (無限循環)

 

目前應對的方式就是先不要更新

但如果你已經更新並且不斷的發作中

你可以試著用底下的方式救急

(如果以下文字有任何一條您看不懂，請去找能看懂的人幫你)

1. 重新啟動進入 BIOS/UEFI

2. 在 BIOS 中，尋找 Security，然後開啟 Virtualization 或 Advanced CPU Settings

3. 關閉“ Intel TXT ”。它也可以被稱為 Trusted Execution 或 OS Kernel DMA Support

4. 我們可以保留「VT for Direct I/O」（或「VT-d」）處於啟用狀態

5. 儲存變更並退出 BIOS

6. 進入系統，移除 KB5058379

以上報告完畢，希望可以幫到你

目前就等有點軟推出新的更新來修正這個問題啦

然後我們這邊有再遇到一個很鬼的問題

就是進系統居然會被強迫啟動 Copliot ~ 即便你還沒有要呼叫這個功能

Honda Civic e:HEV 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

Ford Kuga MK3 EcoBoost 180 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

Unboxing  ASUSTOR Switch'nstor Gen2 (ASW209X) ASUSTOR Technology 9-port 2.5G Multi-Gigabit Unmanaged Switch

Unboxing MSI Cubi 5 12M Mini PC, Equipped with i3-1215U Processor, Maximum Power Consumption of Only 15W

item.title: Unboxing ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 AX7800 Mesh Wi-Fi 6 Tri-band Commercial Wireless Router Commercial Router for Opening Stores or Multi-SSID Needs
item.itunes:title: Unboxing ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 AX7800 Mesh Wi-Fi 6 Tri-band Commercial Wireless Router Commercial Router for Opening Stores or Multi-SSID Needs
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
To read the Chinese version, please click here

After ASUS showcased the new ExpertWiFi series for commercial use at COMPUTEX 2024,

Fox has been closely following the developments of this series.

From the introduction at the time, it’s clear this series isn’t meant to compete with enterprise-grade routing equipment manufacturers.

Instead, it’s positioned as an option offering features a step above consumer-grade wireless routers.

Fox recently unboxed the ASUS ExpertWiFi EBA63 AX3000 Wi-Fi 6 Commercial PoE Wireless AP,

which serves as a solution for traditional businesses to quickly expand wireless nodes under an existing physical firewall.

This time, we’re unboxing

ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 AX7800 Mesh,

which offers a different choice for businesses like retail stores or rental spaces.

Compared to consumer-grade wireless routers, this model emphasizes SDN (Software-Defined Networking) functionality,

supporting up to 5 SSIDs and enabling a customizable portal page for offering free Wi-Fi to customers.

It also boasts impressive node scalability, supporting up to 12 Mesh nodes (compared to the typical AiMesh limit of 8, beyond which stability may suffer),

providing users who need more advanced features than consumer routers with an alternative in the high-end commercial router market.

 

In terms of specifications, it’s an AX7800 tri-band design with 6 built-in antennas.

It supports dual 5GHz bands, one of which can be dedicated to AiMesh wireless backhaul.

 

The accessories include a wall-mount hook designed specifically for installation,

allowing the EBM68 to blend seamlessly with store decor when mounted on a wall.

 

The exterior features a rounded, white design,

establishing a distinct product characteristic for the ExpertWiFi series (the entire product line is white).

It also differentiates itself stylistically from the ZenWiFi series, which is predominantly black.

 

The top features a large ExpertWiFi logo

and prominent ventilation holes.

 

The ports include one USB 3.0, one 2.5GbE WAN port with Dual WAN support,

and three LAN ports, all supporting up to 1GbE.

 

Now, let’s start setting it up.

The ASUS ExpertWiFi series also offers a convenient mobile app interface.

  

The operation interface is quite similar to the ASUS Router app.

Those familiar with the ASUS Router app should find it easy to get started.

The initial setup process is also very user-friendly.

The series is currently divided into wireless and wired products, and this time we’re selecting the EBM68 for setup.

 

In terms of guided app usage, ASUS’s design is far more user-friendly than others.

Even those less tech-savvy can follow the instructions for easy setup (though they’re unlikely to purchase this series).

 

However, for commercial network products, Fox strongly recommends using the computer interface for more detailed configuration.

  

Compared to consumer routers, ASUS’s Expert commercial network product series

requires agreeing to quite a few terms before use.

  

But this time, we’ll try setting it up using the app for a demonstration.

After completing the basic connection setup, a “Custom Network” setting appears,

which is essentially the SDN setting for ASUS ExpertWiFi.

Through this setting, you can easily and conveniently create multiple wireless network SSIDs

and isolate users based on usage scenarios—a feature not typically found in consumer-grade routers.

     

During the setup process, if a new update is available, the app will prompt you to update to the latest firmware.

   

Compared to the homepage of ASUS’s consumer-grade app, ExpertWiFi’s interface directly displays the status of all system functions.

While it’s relatively simplified, detailed data requires clicking into specific sections.

The interface avoids excessive page-flipping, making it highly intuitive and user-friendly for professional network administrators.

 

   

The detailed settings are largely similar to those of consumer-grade routers, with the standout feature being the custom network functionality.

We’ll demonstrate this next.

 

The ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68’s dashboard interface is more feature-rich compared to the ExpertWiFi EBA63, which lacks router functionality.

The interface is visually clean and straightforward.

The left side of the web interface lists the EBM68’s main features: AiMesh, Custom Network SDN, VPN Server, VPN Fusion, AiProtection, and Traffic Monitoring and Settings.

The dashboard on the main page presents information in card format, sharing the same design philosophy as the app interface, allowing network administrators to quickly grasp the network’s status.

 

The AiMesh design interface will feel very familiar to those accustomed to ASUS systems.

The information interface is essentially ASUS’s familiar web-based management interface.

It supports adding nodes, optimization, topology, and details on connection methods and speeds between nodes.

The EBM68’s Custom Network SDN

supports up to 5 VLANs, with guided settings based on usage scenarios.

 

 

The guest portal settings allow for a high degree of personalization.

 

In addition to built-in images, you can upload custom images

to achieve instructional or promotional effects.

 

This way, users connecting to the wireless network will be presented with a forced advertisement

and must click to agree to the terms of use before accessing the network.

This is ideal for cafes, restaurants, or stores offering free Wi-Fi, with a dedicated “Guest Portal” to guide guests through agreeing to service terms.

These settings are fully customizable.

 

You can also set up additional SSIDs for other purposes,

such as one for internal staff with full wireless network access.

 

Each custom network can be individually disabled,

offering greater flexibility for network customization.

 

The VPN functionality is also quite robust,

offering features typically found only in ASUS’s top-tier consumer models.

ASUS’s signature AiProtection feature is, of course, included here as well.

All other detailed settings are categorized under the Settings section.

Fox personally finds this web layout quite effective.

The overall page is cleaner, and it’s easy to navigate to the appropriate settings category.

 

That concludes the brief unboxing.

In terms of user experience, Fox genuinely believes

that for users who need more advanced features than consumer-grade routers but don’t require enterprise-level equipment,

the ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 offers a highly practical solution.

At a price point below enterprise-grade but slightly above consumer-grade routers,

it provides small businesses or enterprises with essential custom SDN functionality.

Through simple settings, it’s easy to manage multiple SSIDs, with preset scenarios to assist administrators in setup.

For store owners, such as those running cafes or restaurants,

the ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 is definitely a wireless router worth considering for your procurement list.

ASUS ExpertWiFi EBA63 AX3000 Wi-Fi 6 Commercial PoE Wireless AP, a convenient PoE wireless network node expansion solution designed for small and medium-sized enterprises, simple unboxing 

ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 AXE11000 Mesh WiFi 6E Wireless Router, experience the thrill of WiFi 6E + 2.5G full-speed networking, unboxing review 

ASUS ZenWiFi ET12 PRO Chunghwa Telecom Version Hinet Fiber, whole-home WiFi 6E wireless router, simple setup guide and unboxing discussion 

ASUS ZenWiFi XD5 AX3000 Mesh WiFi 6 2T2R Wireless Router System, simple setup guide and a satisfying unboxing with no cut corners 

ASUS ZenWiFi AX Mini XD4 Consumer-Grade Mesh WiFi 6 2T2R Wireless Router System, simple setup guide and a frustrating unboxing 

If you’d like to sponsor a pick-me-up to encourage our editorial team to work harder (minimum 50 units sold),

click here to proceed or scan the QR CODE

To chat with us, please join Foolish Fox’s fan page.

Foolish Fox’s Ramblings

Originally published on fox-saying.com

It also boasts impressive node scalability, supporting up to 12 Mesh nodes (compared to the typical AiMesh limit of 8, beyond which stability may suffer),

providing users who need more advanced features than consumer routers with an alternative in the high-end commercial router market.

 

In terms of specifications, it’s an AX7800 tri-band design with 6 built-in antennas.

It supports dual 5GHz bands, one of which can be dedicated to AiMesh wireless backhaul.

 

The accessories include a wall-mount hook designed specifically for installation,

allowing the EBM68 to blend seamlessly with store decor when mounted on a wall.

 

The exterior features a rounded, white design,

establishing a distinct product characteristic for the ExpertWiFi series (the entire product line is white).

It also differentiates itself stylistically from the ZenWiFi series, which is predominantly black.

 

The top features a large ExpertWiFi logo

and prominent ventilation holes.

 

The ports include one USB 3.0, one 2.5GbE WAN port with Dual WAN support,

and three LAN ports, all supporting up to 1GbE.

 

Now, let’s start setting it up.

The ASUS ExpertWiFi series also offers a convenient mobile app interface.

  

The operation interface is quite similar to the ASUS Router app.

Those familiar with the ASUS Router app should find it easy to get started.

The initial setup process is also very user-friendly.

The series is currently divided into wireless and wired products, and this time we’re selecting the EBM68 for setup.

 

In terms of guided app usage, ASUS’s design is far more user-friendly than others.

Even those less tech-savvy can follow the instructions for easy setup (though they’re unlikely to purchase this series).

 

However, for commercial network products, Fox strongly recommends using the computer interface for more detailed configuration.

  

Compared to consumer routers, ASUS’s Expert commercial network product series

requires agreeing to quite a few terms before use.

  

But this time, we’ll try setting it up using the app for a demonstration.

After completing the basic connection setup, a “Custom Network” setting appears,

which is essentially the SDN setting for ASUS ExpertWiFi.

Through this setting, you can easily and conveniently create multiple wireless network SSIDs

and isolate users based on usage scenarios—a feature not typically found in consumer-grade routers.

     

During the setup process, if a new update is available, the app will prompt you to update to the latest firmware.

   

Compared to the homepage of ASUS’s consumer-grade app, ExpertWiFi’s interface directly displays the status of all system functions.

While it’s relatively simplified, detailed data requires clicking into specific sections.

The interface avoids excessive page-flipping, making it highly intuitive and user-friendly for professional network administrators.

 

   

The detailed settings are largely similar to those of consumer-grade routers, with the standout feature being the custom network functionality.

We’ll demonstrate this next.

 

The ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68’s dashboard interface is more feature-rich compared to the ExpertWiFi EBA63, which lacks router functionality.

The interface is visually clean and straightforward.

The left side of the web interface lists the EBM68’s main features: AiMesh, Custom Network SDN, VPN Server, VPN Fusion, AiProtection, and Traffic Monitoring and Settings.

The dashboard on the main page presents information in card format, sharing the same design philosophy as the app interface, allowing network administrators to quickly grasp the network’s status.

 

The AiMesh design interface will feel very familiar to those accustomed to ASUS systems.

The information interface is essentially ASUS’s familiar web-based management interface.

It supports adding nodes, optimization, topology, and details on connection methods and speeds between nodes.

The EBM68’s Custom Network SDN

supports up to 5 VLANs, with guided settings based on usage scenarios.

 

 

The guest portal settings allow for a high degree of personalization.

 

In addition to built-in images, you can upload custom images

to achieve instructional or promotional effects.

 

This way, users connecting to the wireless network will be presented with a forced advertisement

and must click to agree to the terms of use before accessing the network.

This is ideal for cafes, restaurants, or stores offering free Wi-Fi, with a dedicated “Guest Portal” to guide guests through agreeing to service terms.

These settings are fully customizable.

 

You can also set up additional SSIDs for other purposes,

such as one for internal staff with full wireless network access.

 

Each custom network can be individually disabled,

offering greater flexibility for network customization.

 

The VPN functionality is also quite robust,

offering features typically found only in ASUS’s top-tier consumer models.

ASUS’s signature AiProtection feature is, of course, included here as well.

All other detailed settings are categorized under the Settings section.

Fox personally finds this web layout quite effective.

The overall page is cleaner, and it’s easy to navigate to the appropriate settings category.

 

That concludes the brief unboxing.

In terms of user experience, Fox genuinely believes

that for users who need more advanced features than consumer-grade routers but don’t require enterprise-level equipment,

the ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 offers a highly practical solution.

At a price point below enterprise-grade but slightly above consumer-grade routers,

it provides small businesses or enterprises with essential custom SDN functionality.

Through simple settings, it’s easy to manage multiple SSIDs, with preset scenarios to assist administrators in setup.

For store owners, such as those running cafes or restaurants,

the ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 is definitely a wireless router worth considering for your procurement list.

ASUS ExpertWiFi EBA63 AX3000 Wi-Fi 6 Commercial PoE Wireless AP, a convenient PoE wireless network node expansion solution designed for small and medium-sized enterprises, simple unboxing 

ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 AXE11000 Mesh WiFi 6E Wireless Router, experience the thrill of WiFi 6E + 2.5G full-speed networking, unboxing review 

ASUS ZenWiFi ET12 PRO Chunghwa Telecom Version Hinet Fiber, whole-home WiFi 6E wireless router, simple setup guide and unboxing discussion 

ASUS ZenWiFi XD5 AX3000 Mesh WiFi 6 2T2R Wireless Router System, simple setup guide and a satisfying unboxing with no cut corners 

ASUS ZenWiFi AX Mini XD4 Consumer-Grade Mesh WiFi 6 2T2R Wireless Router System, simple setup guide and a frustrating unboxing 

If you’d like to sponsor a pick-me-up to encourage our editorial team to work harder (minimum 50 units sold),

click here to proceed or scan the QR CODE

To chat with us, please join Foolish Fox’s fan page.

Foolish Fox’s Ramblings

Originally published on fox-saying.com

item.title: Windows 11 23H2 / 22H2 五月累積更新 KB5058405 可修正顯示錯誤碼 0x80240069
item.itunes:title: Windows 11 23H2 / 22H2 五月累積更新 KB5058405 可修正顯示錯誤碼 0x80240069
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
這是關於 Windows 11 23H2 / 22H2 五月累積更新 KB5058405 的內容整理

在開始之前有件重要的事要先跟大家報告

Windows 11 版本 22H2 的家用版和專業版 (企業版與教育版不在此限) 已於 2024 年 10 月 8 日終止服務

所以推薦大家盡可能將手邊的機器前進到 24H2

然後這一篇開頭也想讓大家幫忙刷一下這一篇機車改裝紀錄文，來督促老G加快更新的腳步

[改裝日記] KYMCO RTS R 165 改裝 MD 摩德舒適坐墊及自動彈起座墊鉸鏈(含坐墊強化)

接著是

如果你從 22H2 更新到 23H2 之後，你必須重新打開 ㄅ半注音輸入法

如有必要的話，請您參考

Windows 11 ㄅ半注音輸入法 開啟教學 (微軟舊注音輸入法)

順利更新 KB5058405 完成之後，系統版本將來到

22H2 OS Build 22621.5335

23H2 OS Build 22631.5335

如果您在 Windows Update 中沒看到這個更新可 點我前往下載 離線更新包

更新內容包含上月底的安全更新

所以底下這篇必看喔

Windows 11 22H2 / 23H2 四月安全更新 KB5055629 內容整理

然後追加更新內容為

  • [安全開機進階目標 (SBAT) 和 Linux 可擴展固件介面 (EFI) ] 此更新針對偵測 Linux 系統時的 SBAT 套用改進。

  • [Windows Update] 已修正：此更新解決您可能無法透過 WSUS 更新至 Windows 11 版本 24H2 的問題。 下載可能無法開始或完成，顯示錯誤碼0x80240069，並顯示「服務已意外停止」的記錄。

目前此版本已經不存在已知問題

如果你遇到未知問題請分享給我

祝更新順利~~~可以的話跟著我一起前進 24H2 吧

HONDA CR-V MK6 1.5T Prestige 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄

Cooling Factor CFW120M 120mm PWM Fan Unboxing Review

[高雄岡山美食] 松泰羊肉店 岡山老字號溫體羊肉店 量多美味 大推薦

Ford KUGA MK3 原廠四輪定位參數紀錄

[台南美食] 陳媽香辣棧 主打酥脆炸臭豆腐與配料豐富的臭豆腐鍋 簡單食記

如果您想贊助提神良方，鼓勵編輯部更努力 (低銷 50)

可以點我前往 或是掃 QR CODE

想要跟我們聊天，請加入傻瓜狐狸的粉絲團

傻瓜狐狸的狐言亂語

原文發表於傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品

item.title: Windows 10 22H2 / 21H2 五月安全性更新 KB5058379 更新內容整理
item.itunes:title: Windows 10 22H2 / 21H2 五月安全性更新 KB5058379 更新內容整理
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
Windows 10 22H2 / 21H2 的五月更新 KB5058379 來啦

即便要紀錄這個更新給大家，還是要提醒你 Windows 10 全系列要停止支援了喔

(詳細看這篇 ~ Windows 10 全版本即將停止所有相關支援)

所以我推薦大家跟上我們的腳步一起前進 Windows 11 24H2 吧

然後大家看更新報告之餘，也順便幫我們的鞭擊老G 的新機車賀彩一下吧

KYMCO RTS R 165 新世代水冷超級街跑 速克達 光陽吹起反攻速高階速克達市場號角的力作 開箱

回到這個更新 KB5058379

此版本的基於上個月底的 KB5055612 製做完成

所以底下這篇必看喔

Windows 10 22H2 四月可選更新 KB5055612 安裝後可修正部份 GPU 輔助功能

順利安裝本次更新之後，您的系統版本將會來到

22H2-OS Build 19045.5854

21H2-OS Build 19044.5854

如果您在 Windows Update 中沒看到這個更新，可 點我前往下載 離線更新包

更新內容除了上個月可選更新的內容之外

還新增

[安全啟動高級目標 (SBAT) 和 Linux 可擴展韌體介面 (EFI)] 此更新對 SBAT 進行了改進，以檢測 Linux 系統。

目前已知問題

Citrix

症狀

已安裝特定 Citrix 元件的裝置可能無法完成 2025 年 1 月 Windows 安全性更新的安裝。 在使用 Citrix 工作階段錄製代理程式 (SRA) 版本 2411 的裝置上觀察到這個問題。 此應用程式的 2411 版已於 2024 年 12 月發行。
 
受影響的裝置一開始可能會正確下載並套用 2025 年 1 月 Windows 安全性更新，例如透過 [設定] 中的 Windows Update 頁面。 不過，當您重新啟動裝置以完成更新安裝時，會顯示類似「未如預期般進行。 不用擔心 - 正在復原變更」的錯誤訊息。 然後裝置將會還原為先前在裝置上顯示的 Windows 更新。 
 
此問題可能會影響少數組織，因為 SRA 應用程式版本 2411 是新版本。 家庭使用者不受此問題影響。 

因應措施

Citrix 已記錄此問題，包括可在安裝 2025 年 1 月 Windows 安全性更新之前執行的因應措施。 如需詳細資料，請參閱 Citrix 的文件。

Microsoft 正與 Citrix 合作解決此問題，一旦解決方案可供使用，便會更新此文件。

以上報告完畢 ~ 祝更新順利
 
飛隼 FALKEN ZIEX CT60 A/S 225/60R18 簡單開箱與使用紀錄
Ford Kuga MK3.5 1.5T Active 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
[恆春美食] 阿香羊肉店 恆春鎮中心的知名羊肉店 不同於岡山羊肉的美味
解決華碩無線路由器對 IoT 設備 5G 頻道降速與 AiMesh 無線回程突然失效的方法
[恆春美食] 福記肉羹蒸餃 兩樣各來一份 便宜好吃肯定讓你吃的開心
 
 

如果您想贊助提神良方，鼓勵編輯部更努力 (低銷 50)

可以點我前往 或是掃 QR CODE

想要跟我們聊天，請加入傻瓜狐狸的粉絲團

傻瓜狐狸的狐言亂語

原文發表於傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品

item.content:encoded:
Windows 10 22H2 / 21H2 的五月更新 KB5058379 來啦

即便要紀錄這個更新給大家，還是要提醒你 Windows 10 全系列要停止支援了喔

(詳細看這篇 ~ Windows 10 全版本即將停止所有相關支援)

所以我推薦大家跟上我們的腳步一起前進 Windows 11 24H2 吧

然後大家看更新報告之餘，也順便幫我們的鞭擊老G 的新機車賀彩一下吧

KYMCO RTS R 165 新世代水冷超級街跑 速克達 光陽吹起反攻速高階速克達市場號角的力作 開箱

回到這個更新 KB5058379

此版本的基於上個月底的 KB5055612 製做完成

所以底下這篇必看喔

Windows 10 22H2 四月可選更新 KB5055612 安裝後可修正部份 GPU 輔助功能

順利安裝本次更新之後，您的系統版本將會來到

22H2-OS Build 19045.5854

21H2-OS Build 19044.5854

如果您在 Windows Update 中沒看到這個更新，可 點我前往下載 離線更新包

更新內容除了上個月可選更新的內容之外

還新增

[安全啟動高級目標 (SBAT) 和 Linux 可擴展韌體介面 (EFI)] 此更新對 SBAT 進行了改進，以檢測 Linux 系統。

目前已知問題

Citrix

症狀

已安裝特定 Citrix 元件的裝置可能無法完成 2025 年 1 月 Windows 安全性更新的安裝。 在使用 Citrix 工作階段錄製代理程式 (SRA) 版本 2411 的裝置上觀察到這個問題。 此應用程式的 2411 版已於 2024 年 12 月發行。
 
受影響的裝置一開始可能會正確下載並套用 2025 年 1 月 Windows 安全性更新，例如透過 [設定] 中的 Windows Update 頁面。 不過，當您重新啟動裝置以完成更新安裝時，會顯示類似「未如預期般進行。 不用擔心 - 正在復原變更」的錯誤訊息。 然後裝置將會還原為先前在裝置上顯示的 Windows 更新。 
 
此問題可能會影響少數組織，因為 SRA 應用程式版本 2411 是新版本。 家庭使用者不受此問題影響。 

因應措施

Citrix 已記錄此問題，包括可在安裝 2025 年 1 月 Windows 安全性更新之前執行的因應措施。 如需詳細資料，請參閱 Citrix 的文件。

Microsoft 正與 Citrix 合作解決此問題，一旦解決方案可供使用，便會更新此文件。

以上報告完畢 ~ 祝更新順利
 
飛隼 FALKEN ZIEX CT60 A/S 225/60R18 簡單開箱與使用紀錄
Ford Kuga MK3.5 1.5T Active 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
[恆春美食] 阿香羊肉店 恆春鎮中心的知名羊肉店 不同於岡山羊肉的美味

item.itunes:summary:
Windows 11 24H2 五月份的累積更新 KB5058411 來囉

開始之前提醒大家 ~ WIN10 快要停止更新了喔

(Windows 10 全版本即將停止所有相關支援)

未來要組新的電腦可能就得往 Win11 24H2 這邊過來會比較方便

我這邊其實也 24H2 一段時間了，所以要在我的機子上還原問題來測試的話

24H2 是比較快的系統

接著必須要讓大家知道的

如果你是新升級到 24H2 的ㄅ半使用者

您可以參考底下這一篇文字來打開ㄅ半注音輸入法

Windows 11 ㄅ半注音輸入法 開啟教學 (微軟舊注音輸入法)

回到關於 Windows 11 24H2 的 5 月累積更新 KB5058411 上

順利安裝此更新之後，你的系統版本號將來到

OS Build 26100.4061

如果您在 Windows Update 中沒看到這個更新可 點我前往下載 離線更新包

關於更新內容

這個更新主要基於上個月底的安全更新製成，所以底下這連結內容一定要看

Windows 11 24H2 四月安全更新 KB5055627 更新內容整理

除了上面那連結中的所有內容會被安裝進來之外

還新增了

[音訊] 已修正：此更新解決了麥克風音訊可能意外靜音的問題。

[眼球控制器] 已修正：眼球控制器應用程式無法啟動。

item.title: 終於不拖戲了! Kingston 金士頓 FURY Renegade G5 PCIe 5.0 NVMe M.2 固態硬碟 總算上市了 !
item.itunes:title: 終於不拖戲了! Kingston 金士頓 FURY Renegade G5 PCIe 5.0 NVMe M.2 固態硬碟 總算上市了 !
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
開始先跟大家說 ~ 我們這邊已經很多年沒有收到來自 Kingston 的測試品了

所以這一顆 SSD 的實際效能如何，我們在第一時間驗證的機會應該是等於 0

未來看看有沒有大德要贊助測試，我們再來研究

先給大家看看新聞稿就好

這是 Kingston 的第一款 PCIe 5.0 NVMe M.2 固態硬碟

FURY Renegade G5

 

全球記憶體與儲存領導品牌金士頓旗下的高效能產品線 Kingston FURY，宣布正式推出全新 PCIe 5.0 NVMe M.2 固態硬碟 — Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟，專為遊戲玩家與追求極致效能的進階使用者量身打造。
Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟採用最新 PCIe Gen5 x4 控制器與3D TLC NAND，讀寫速度高達 14,800MB/s 及 14,000MB/s¹，隨機讀寫效能更超過 200 萬 IOPS，是目前市場上速度最快的固態硬碟之一。無論是身處遊戲激戰、進行高畫質影片剪輯，或處理AI運算所需的海量數據，Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟都能為高效能電腦與工作站有效消除儲存裝置瓶頸，並大幅縮短載入時間，提供前所未有的速度與反應時間，徹底解放系統潛能。
為同時實現卓越效能與絕佳穩定性，Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟採用先進6nm製程的 慧榮科技Silicon Motion SM2508控制器，搭配低功耗 DDR4 DRAM 快取記憶體，有效降低發熱與功耗。無論用於高階應用程式、內容創作工作流程，或是需提高生產效率，這款儲存解決方案都能滿足各種嚴苛需求，顯著提升遊戲體驗與專業工作表現。
金士頓表示：「我們很高興宣布Kingston FURY高效能產品線再添強勁生力軍。結合 Kingston FURY Renegade G5 SSD 固態硬碟與Kingston FURY記憶體的強大效能，高性能專業用戶和硬體愛好者都能打造出最理想的完美系統。」
Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟提供 1024GB、2048GB 與 4096GB 三種容量選擇，並享五年有限保固⁵、免費技術支援，為用戶提供全方位的產品保障。
更多資訊，請瀏覽kingston.com。

Kingston FURY Renegade G5 PCIe 5.0 NVMe M.2 SSD固態硬碟 產品特色與規格
•    極致 PCIe Gen5 速度：以極致的 PCIe Gen5 x4 規格，掌握高達 14,800/14,000MB/s1 讀取/寫入速度和高達 2,200,000/2,200,000 IOPS1 的絕佳效能。
•    進階散熱設計：採用以 6 奈米製程為基礎的Silicon Motion SM2508控制器，可提升散熱管理表現，並搭載降低耗電量的低功耗 DDR4 DRAM 快取，獨立 Buck IC 確保穩定的功率輸出，以及 12 層 PCB 設計以增強訊號品質和資料完整性。
•    無縫整合：M.2 2280 精巧的外觀尺寸，可輕鬆插入大多數主機板，並向下相容 Gen3 和 Gen4 系統。
•    最大化儲存容量：高達 4096GB2 完整儲存容量的極致效能選擇，隨意儲存喜愛的遊戲和多媒體檔案。
•    外觀尺寸： M.2 2280
•    傳輸介面：PCIe 5.0 x4 NVMe
•    儲存容量2：1024GB, 2048GB, 4096GB
•    控制器：Silicon Motion SM2508
•    NAND: 3D TLC
•    DRAM 快取：有
•    支援 DirectStorage：有
•    連續讀取/寫入1：
o    1024GB - 高達 14,200/11,000MB/s
o    2048GB - 高達 14,700/14,000MB/s
o    4096GB - 高達 14,800/14,000MB/s
•    隨機 4K 讀取/寫入1：
o    1024GB - 高達 2,200,000/2,150,000 IOPS
o    2048GB - 4096GB - 高達 2,200,000/2,200,000 IOPS
•    耐用度 (寫入的總位元組數)3：
o    1024GB – 1.0PB
o    2048GB – 2.0PB
o    4096GB – 4.0PB
•    耗電量4：
o    1024GB – 平均 0.27W / 6.6W @ 14.2G / 6.6W (最大值)
o    2048GB – 平均 0.27W / 7.0W @ 14.7G / 7.0W (最大值)
o    4096GB – 平均 0.27W / 7.1W @ 14.8G / 9.5W (最大值)
•    儲存溫度：-40°C~85°C
•    作業溫度：0°C ~ 70°C
•    尺寸：80mm x 22mm x 2.3mm
•    重量：
o    1024GB – 7.3g
o    2048GB-4096GB – 7.7g
•    震動 (作業中)：最大2.17G (7-800Hz)
•    震動 (非作業中)：最大20G (20-1000Hz)
•    平均故障間隔時間 (MTBF)：2,000,000小時
•    保固/支援5： 5 年有限產品保固及免費技術支援服務

Kingston NV3 PCIe 4X4 SSD 上市，雖然比上一代更快但仍然推薦當成冷資料碟或快取碟使用就好

PNY RP60 Portable SSD 1TB USB 3.2 Gen2X2 Type-C 外接式硬碟快速開箱實測

PNY XLR8 CS3150-XHS M.2 NVMe Gen 5×4 SSD with RGB Heatsink 2TB 簡單開箱，有 RGB 燈光 、有主動散熱、還有超高速讀寫的效能

美光 Micron Crucial P3 NVMe PCIe M.2 1TB Gen3 X4 SSD 固態硬碟 開箱簡單測試

[推薦] GoingBus 在省錢與省麻煩之間，幫你找到個最便利平衡點的串流影音帳號合租平台

這是 Kingston 的第一款 PCIe 5.0 NVMe M.2 固態硬碟

FURY Renegade G5

 

全球記憶體與儲存領導品牌金士頓旗下的高效能產品線 Kingston FURY，宣布正式推出全新 PCIe 5.0 NVMe M.2 固態硬碟 — Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟，專為遊戲玩家與追求極致效能的進階使用者量身打造。
Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟採用最新 PCIe Gen5 x4 控制器與3D TLC NAND，讀寫速度高達 14,800MB/s 及 14,000MB/s¹，隨機讀寫效能更超過 200 萬 IOPS，是目前市場上速度最快的固態硬碟之一。無論是身處遊戲激戰、進行高畫質影片剪輯，或處理AI運算所需的海量數據，Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟都能為高效能電腦與工作站有效消除儲存裝置瓶頸，並大幅縮短載入時間，提供前所未有的速度與反應時間，徹底解放系統潛能。
為同時實現卓越效能與絕佳穩定性，Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟採用先進6nm製程的 慧榮科技Silicon Motion SM2508控制器，搭配低功耗 DDR4 DRAM 快取記憶體，有效降低發熱與功耗。無論用於高階應用程式、內容創作工作流程，或是需提高生產效率，這款儲存解決方案都能滿足各種嚴苛需求，顯著提升遊戲體驗與專業工作表現。
金士頓表示：「我們很高興宣布Kingston FURY高效能產品線再添強勁生力軍。結合 Kingston FURY Renegade G5 SSD 固態硬碟與Kingston FURY記憶體的強大效能，高性能專業用戶和硬體愛好者都能打造出最理想的完美系統。」
Kingston FURY Renegade G5固態硬碟提供 1024GB、2048GB 與 4096GB 三種容量選擇，並享五年有限保固⁵、免費技術支援，為用戶提供全方位的產品保障。
更多資訊，請瀏覽kingston.com。

Kingston FURY Renegade G5 PCIe 5.0 NVMe M.2 SSD固態硬碟 產品特色與規格
•    極致 PCIe Gen5 速度：以極致的 PCIe Gen5 x4 規格，掌握高達 14,800/14,000MB/s1 讀取/寫入速度和高達 2,200,000/2,200,000 IOPS1 的絕佳效能。
•    進階散熱設計：採用以 6 奈米製程為基礎的Silicon Motion SM2508控制器，可提升散熱管理表現，並搭載降低耗電量的低功耗 DDR4 DRAM 快取，獨立 Buck IC 確保穩定的功率輸出，以及 12 層 PCB 設計以增強訊號品質和資料完整性。
•    無縫整合：M.2 2280 精巧的外觀尺寸，可輕鬆插入大多數主機板，並向下相容 Gen3 和 Gen4 系統。
•    最大化儲存容量：高達 4096GB2 完整儲存容量的極致效能選擇，隨意儲存喜愛的遊戲和多媒體檔案。
•    外觀尺寸： M.2 2280
•    傳輸介面：PCIe 5.0 x4 NVMe
•    儲存容量2：1024GB, 2048GB, 4096GB
•    控制器：Silicon Motion SM2508
•    NAND: 3D TLC
•    DRAM 快取：有
•    支援 DirectStorage：有
•    連續讀取/寫入1：
o    1024GB - 高達 14,200/11,000MB/s
o    2048GB - 高達 14,700/14,000MB/s
o    4096GB - 高達 14,800/14,000MB/s
•    隨機 4K 讀取/寫入1：
o    1024GB - 高達 2,200,000/2,150,000 IOPS
o    2048GB - 4096GB - 高達 2,200,000/2,200,000 IOPS
•    耐用度 (寫入的總位元組數)3：
o    1024GB – 1.0PB
o    2048GB – 2.0PB
o    4096GB – 4.0PB
•    耗電量4：
o    1024GB – 平均 0.27W / 6.6W @ 14.2G / 6.6W (最大值)
o    2048GB – 平均 0.27W / 7.0W @ 14.7G / 7.0W (最大值)
o    4096GB – 平均 0.27W / 7.1W @ 14.8G / 9.5W (最大值)
•    儲存溫度：-40°C~85°C
•    作業溫度：0°C ~ 70°C
•    尺寸：80mm x 22mm x 2.3mm
•    重量：
o    1024GB – 7.3g
o    2048GB-4096GB – 7.7g
•    震動 (作業中)：最大2.17G (7-800Hz)
•    震動 (非作業中)：最大20G (20-1000Hz)
•    平均故障間隔時間 (MTBF)：2,000,000小時
•    保固/支援5： 5 年有限產品保固及免費技術支援服務

Kingston NV3 PCIe 4X4 SSD 上市，雖然比上一代更快但仍然推薦當成冷資料碟或快取碟使用就好

PNY RP60 Portable SSD 1TB USB 3.2 Gen2X2 Type-C 外接式硬碟快速開箱實測

PNY XLR8 CS3150-XHS M.2 NVMe Gen 5×4 SSD with RGB Heatsink 2TB 簡單開箱，有 RGB 燈光 、有主動散熱、還有超高速讀寫的效能

美光 Micron Crucial P3 NVMe PCIe M.2 1TB Gen3 X4 SSD 固態硬碟 開箱簡單測試

[推薦] GoingBus 在省錢與省麻煩之間，幫你找到個最便利平衡點的串流影音帳號合租平台
item.content:encoded:
開始先跟大家說 ~ 我們這邊已經很多年沒有收到來自 Kingston 的測試品了

所以這一顆 SSD 的實際效能如何，我們在第一時間驗證的機會應該是等於 0

未來看看有沒有大德要贊助測試，我們再來研究

item.title: ASUSTOR Switch'nstor Gen2 (ASW209X) ASUSTOR Technology 9-port 2.5G Multi-Gigabit Unmanaged Switch Simple Unboxing
item.itunes:title: ASUSTOR Switch'nstor Gen2 (ASW209X) ASUSTOR Technology 9-port 2.5G Multi-Gigabit Unmanaged Switch Simple Unboxing
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
To read the Chinese version, please click here

Today, I want to show everyone a Switch. In recent years, Fox has started recommending the NSA brand's unmanaged Ethernet switch.

If you want to upgrade your home network speed without planning to rewire and continue using CAT 5E,

upgrading your Ethernet switch to a 2.5G switch seems like a good choice.

Moreover, if your NAS has a 2.5G network port, upgrading your internal network to 2.5G will make data transmission more efficient.

ASUSTOR Switch'nstor Gen2 (ASW209X) ASUSTOR Technology 9-Port 2.5G Multi-Gigabit Unmanaged Switch

 

This type of switch is not yet commonly found in stores like Tsann Kuen or Sunfar.

The main reason is that compared to the currently popular 1G models, the price is not very affordable.

However, once you decide to skip that level, you’ll find that the price of this one is actually quite reasonable.

Additionally, when Fox purchased it through Shopee, it was surprisingly... very plain!!

(Recently, it seems like this kind of product packaging tends to follow this style)

 

The power adapter provides a commonly used international multi-plug specification combination.

You can swap it with a suitable plug based on your country.

 

The transformer is relatively square in shape.

You need to be mindful of its position on the power outlet.

 

In addition to 8 2.5G RJ-45 ports, the ASUSTOR ASW209X

also includes one 10G SFP+ port, enabling uplink speeds of 10G.

However, for home use... it’s uncertain when providers like Chunghwa Telecom will offer 10G upload/download speeds for residential use; it’s unlikely in the short term.

All indicator lights and ports are on the front.

The indicator lights are directly integrated into the ports.

  

The power input is located on the back of the device.

 

All ports are fully connected, but there’s no SFP+ related equipment currently.

So, the performance of that connection couldn’t be tested.

For 2.5G connections, the indicator shows green, while 1G or below shows yellow.

 

We used the ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 AXE11000 Mesh WiFi 6E Wireless Router to provide a 2.5G connection.

One of the ports was connected to our NAS DS918+ via Synology DiskStation DS918+ NAS with 2.5G Expansion for high-speed connection.

It was also connected to Whip-Old-G’s computer with the ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z690 EXTREME, a top-tier motherboard with the Eye of Faith.

We tested the speed of transferring files from the NAS to the computer, and the 2.5G speed was fully utilized.

 

Currently, out of the 8 2.5G ports, only 4 support 2.5G networking.

The 1 10G SFP+ port is currently unused... the equipment needed for it is too expensive.

The above is a simple unboxing. The price of this device is now at a relatively affordable level.

With a small investment, you can significantly upgrade your home network speed.

If you’re looking to buy a network switch recently, consider checking out this product (you can compare prices here).

 

Intel® Wi-Fi 7 BE200 Wireless Network Card Replacement Test: Early Adoption of Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) for a Next-Generation Experience 

ASUSTOR AS-U2.5G2 USB3.0 USB-A+C Dual Interface Network Expansion Card 

[Free] Xiaomi Smart Camera Viewer Program for PC Download 

ASUS ExpertWiFi EBM68 AX7800 Mesh Wi-Fi 6 Tri-Band Commercial Wireless Router: Quick Unboxing for Businesses or Multi-SSID Needs 

Ford Kuga EcoBoost 180 Flagship Model: Long-Term Fuel Consumption and Maintenance Cost Records, 2024 Edition 

 

If you’d like to sponsor some energy drinks to encourage the editorial team to work harder (minimum 50)

Click here to proceed or scan the QR CODE

To chat with us, please joinFoolish Fox’s Fan Page

Foolish Fox’s Random Mutterings

Originally published onFox-saying.com

item.title: [台南美食] 阿星嬤虱目魚粥 夏林路在地六十年 從早餐時段營業到午餐 大推乾煎魚腸
item.itunes:title: [台南美食] 阿星嬤虱目魚粥 夏林路在地六十年 從早餐時段營業到午餐 大推乾煎魚腸
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
台南人的早餐總是特別豐富這句話應該不少人有聽說過

在這裡的早餐可以吃到的內容時常跟現代人印象中的午餐一樣豐富

而這類的店家通常的營業時間也都是從凌晨一路經營到中午過後一點點

今天要分享給大家的這一家店也是這樣的形態

此店自稱在這裡已經營業 60 年囉 ~~~

雖然有些網紅會說這家店看起來生意還好，就只有網路上的介紹名氣比較大

但其實能存在一甲子的歲數，這家店還是有其強項的

讓我們一起來吃吃看台南的在地古早味早餐吧

店家資料在這

阿星嬤虱目魚粥

台南市南區夏林路1-26號

05:00 ~ 13:30

週三公休

這裡很好停車的 ! 以其營業時間來看，店前面大多會有停車位

如果真的運氣不好，找不到路邊停車的話 ~ 對面就有水萍塭公園停車場 (一小時 20 元，比路邊停車還便宜)

然後讓我們來看菜單

價格方面不算貴，就算以整個台南市區的店來看也是數於中間價位

在夏林路上則算是中偏低的

雖然招牌看起來很觀光客店，但其實上門的多是在地客

來看看我在這邊吃了些什麼

這一碗很多魚肚的虱目魚肚+蚵仔湯

這種湯在煮沒多大訣竅，就主打一個新鮮

只要原料夠新鮮，魚肚、蚵仔、蔥、薑、米酒搭起來就是美味

肉燥飯比較特別的是會多鋪一些香菜上去

不敢吃香菜的朋友要記得提醒店家不要加

敢吃的話，就試試吧 ~ 意外的對味喔

燙青菜的份量還不錯，這樣 45 元算合理價

吃飯沒有蔬菜不行的朋友要記得點

因為這是此店少數有大量蔬菜的菜式了

我個人大推的是這一道

乾煎魚腸

這道在台南以外的海產店不容易吃到

在台南的話則是在比乾煎的功力

煎到酥、乾、爽口是重點

有些店會選擇用炸的來降低失敗率，但我個人還是喜歡乾煎會較爽口一些

來這裡推薦大家一定要點這個來吃吃看

 

以上這是我們兩人份的早餐

基本上對食量較小的人來說，這樣的份量也可以當中餐了

吃起來的口味算爽口，材料的新鮮度也不錯

是可以安心吃海鮮類食物的店

如果你在夏林路一帶的民宿過夜的話，可以試著起早來這裡吃吃看台南古早味式的早餐喔

[台南美食] 陳媽香辣棧 主打酥脆炸臭豆腐與配料豐富的臭豆腐鍋 簡單食記

[台南美食] 李桑飯店 保安店 保安路上小餐館 新菜色 鹹酥雞便當小試食記

[台南美食] 達也濱家漁場 藏身水仙宮市場的日式料理店 生魚片處理技巧很棒 ~ 大推

[台南美食] 阿美純手工麻糬 便宜、大顆、餡飽滿、超好吃 總是大排長龍的古早味甜點店

[台南] 七誠米粿 國華街上近水仙宮市場的名店 但是..... 簡單食記

item.title: MSI Cubi 5 12M Mini PC, Equipped with i3-1215U Processor, Maximum Power Consumption of Only 15W, Simple Unboxing
item.itunes:title: MSI Cubi 5 12M Mini PC, Equipped with i3-1215U Processor, Maximum Power Consumption of Only 15W, Simple Unboxing
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
Recently, I've been enjoying tinkering with some mini PCs.

A while ago, I got a super cheap mini PC with an N100 processor, which has quite mainland-oriented specs, to try out. You can check out the unboxing below.

Acer Revo Box RB102 Quad-Core Mini PC: Small but Fully Equipped, a Low-Power Choice for Office Work, Quick Unboxing

The conclusion back then was that the N100 is sufficient for general use, but it stutters the moment the usage spikes.

So, we decided to get another mini PC with an i3 processor for further testing.

The chosen model is

MSI Cubi 5 12M-012BTW

This series of PCs, aside from black and white color options, comes with different model suffixes depending on the equipped CPU ~ that is, the string after the - above.

 

The CPU built into the model I chose is the i3-1215U.

Performance-core X 2

Efficient-core X 4

A total of 8 threads

Compared to the N100, which only has Efficient-core X 4, the performance is naturally much better.

So, for the same Cubi 5 series ~ the version with the N100 is 4000 yuan cheaper, and the N200 is 3000 yuan cheaper.

(I usually take photos while setting up the system, so please ignore the dust and background in the images.)

The motherboard size is approximately 124 x 124 x 53.7 (mm).

If you have no concept of the size, think of stacking two 12CM system fans together, and that’s about it.

 

There are a total of five USB ports.

The front has two USB-A (USB 3.2 Gen 2) + one USB-C (this one supports ThunderBolt 4).

 

The other two USB 3.2 Gen 2 ports are at the back.

HDMI and DP are also located here.

We can also see that this PC provides 1Gb and 2.5Gb network interfaces.

Paired with MSI’s exclusive BIOS that locks the hard drive and network ports, it can be used to set up a dual-network zone.

This ensures that confidential data is restricted to a closed local network for data exchange, preventing data transmission over the internet.

It also prevents hackers from infiltrating and stealing sensitive data via the internet.

 

But I believe most people won’t use it in such a complex way.

Generally, it’s more commonly used as a media or office machine.

So, how much memory and storage it can hold is likely more important to most people.

You can open it from the bottom with four screws.

A special reminder here ~ the vents on this side are the main air intake area for this PC.

When placing it, make sure not to cover this area with non-breathable materials.

Additionally, you can see the mounting interface here, which can be paired with a VESA bracket to hang it behind a monitor or TV.

 

Opening the bottom cover

I bought the barebones version, so it’s quite empty inside when opened, and you’ll need to install components yourself.

There are two SO-DIMM slots, with each slot supporting up to 32GB of DDR4 (up to 64GB total).

One M.2 2280 slot

If you need to expand with a second SSD, you can only use a 2.5" SATA (this drive must be fixed to the back cover).

The wireless network card is pre-installed ~ the model is Intel AX211.

 

The heatsink is on the other side of the motherboard.

It’s the typical cooling solution used in laptops (don’t mind ~ the CPU is actually a laptop version too).

 

I stress-tested it for 24 hours, with an ambient temperature of about 25 degrees.

Usage fluctuated between 50% and 100%.

The CPU clock speed successfully reached the maximum turbo boost of 4.4GHz.

The CPU temperature hovered around 65 degrees.

The system temperature was quite stable at 55 degrees.

Being able to hit the maximum clock speed indicates that the motherboard’s power supply is sufficient ~ very good.

 

Finally, let’s look at the power supply.

The CPU’s maximum power consumption is 15W, and with other power demands and external devices, around 50W should be sufficient.

The power supply provided by MSI is manufactured by Chicony, with an output of 65W.

That’s it, it’s up and running ~ The PC it replaced was

Highly Flexible Mini Barebones System: ASRock DeskMini 110 Mini PC Unboxing and Assembly

Theoretically, it should be much more power-efficient. I’ll share updates and thoughts on the fan page later.

That’s all for now.

[Tainan Food] Xiao Dong Beef Soup: Featuring Unique Broth and Plenty of Fresh Beef Options ~ My Favorite High-Value Fresh Beef Soup Shop, Simple Review

Honda Civic e:HEV Long-Term Fuel Consumption and Maintenance Cost Record, 2025 Edition

Ford Kuga EcoBoost 180 Long-Term Fuel Consumption and Maintenance Cost Record, 2025 Edition

[Tainan Food] ICHIRO, Let’s Go! Explosively Delicious Fried Chicken, Simple Review: The Owner is an Ichiro Fan, Simple Cocktails Available at Night

[Tainan Food] Yongle Beef Soup: A Super Popular Fresh Beef Soup Shop at Yongle Market, Open from Midnight to Breakfast Time

[Tainan Food] Xiao Mao Wu: Tainan’s Super Classic Delicious Pot-Burned Noodles, Simple Review

If you’d like to sponsor some energy drinks to encourage the editorial team to work harder (minimum 50)

Click here to proceed or scan the QR CODE

To chat with us, please joinFoolish Fox’s Fan Page

Originally published onFox-saying.com

The other two USB 3.2 Gen 2 ports are at the back.

HDMI and DP are also located here.

We can also see that this PC provides 1Gb and 2.5Gb network interfaces.

Paired with MSI’s exclusive BIOS that locks the hard drive and network ports, it can be used to set up a dual-network zone.

This ensures that confidential data is restricted to a closed local network for data exchange, preventing data transmission over the internet.

It also prevents hackers from infiltrating and stealing sensitive data via the internet.

 

But I believe most people won’t use it in such a complex way.

Generally, it’s more commonly used as a media or office machine.

So, how much memory and storage it can hold is likely more important to most people.

You can open it from the bottom with four screws.

A special reminder here ~ the vents on this side are the main air intake area for this PC.

When placing it, make sure not to cover this area with non-breathable materials.

Additionally, you can see the mounting interface here, which can be paired with a VESA bracket to hang it behind a monitor or TV.

 

Opening the bottom cover

I bought the barebones version, so it’s quite empty inside when opened, and you’ll need to install components yourself.

There are two SO-DIMM slots, with each slot supporting up to 32GB of DDR4 (up to 64GB total).

One M.2 2280 slot

If you need to expand with a second SSD, you can only use a 2.5" SATA (this drive must be fixed to the back cover).

The wireless network card is pre-installed ~ the model is Intel AX211.

 

The heatsink is on the other side of the motherboard.

It’s the typical cooling solution used in laptops (don’t mind ~ the CPU is actually a laptop version too).

 

I stress-tested it for 24 hours, with an ambient temperature of about 25 degrees.

Usage fluctuated between 50% and 100%.

The CPU clock speed successfully reached the maximum turbo boost of 4.4GHz.

The CPU temperature hovered around 65 degrees.

The system temperature was quite stable at 55 degrees.

Being able to hit the maximum clock speed indicates that the motherboard’s power supply is sufficient ~ very good.

 

Finally, let’s look at the power supply.

The CPU’s maximum power consumption is 15W, and with other power demands and external devices, around 50W should be sufficient.

The power supply provided by MSI is manufactured by Chicony, with an output of 65W.

That’s it, it’s up and running ~ The PC it replaced was

Highly Flexible Mini Barebones System: ASRock DeskMini 110 Mini PC Unboxing and Assembly

Theoretically, it should be much more power-efficient. I’ll share updates and thoughts on the fan page later.

That’s all for now.

item.title: ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 韌體 3.0.0.6.102.36602 上架，修正 5G 頻段的連線穩定性
item.itunes:title: ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 韌體 3.0.0.6.102.36602 上架，修正 5G 頻段的連線穩定性
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
這次的更新來的很緊急，但也不意外就是了

畢竟同樣的問題在其他型號上也發生過

大家有興趣可以去了解一下底下這篇內容 (內有整理了第一波型號列表)

解決華碩無線路由器對 IoT 設備 5G 頻道降速與 AiMesh 無線回程突然失效的方法

基本上這些問題不會發生在每一部無線路由器上，更不是總會發生

只是發生時會比較煩一點就是了

而這版本的韌體就是很單一性的解決上頭說過的問題

所以我認為不管你是否有遇到連線上的怪問題，都更新進去就對了

透過底下的連結大家可以認識一下這一部無線路由器

關於這部 ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 的開箱，我們完成了三篇文字，大家可以看一下

標準版

華碩 ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 AXE11000 Mesh WiFi 6E 無線路由器 體驗最新的 WiFi 6E + 2.5G 全速飆網的快感 開箱分享 

中華電信版

ASUS Zenwifi ET12 PRO 中華電信版 Hinet 光世代 全屋通 WIFI6E 無線路由器 簡單架設教學與開箱小聊 

然後接下這一篇大家可以參考一下

雖然我認為失敗率應該頗高，但使用中華電信版的朋友還是有機會透過此篇教學把最新版韌體刷進去

[教學] 把 ASUS Zenwifi Pro ET12 中華電信版 刷成 ASUS 官方韌體與各種注意事項

因為目前華碩的更新時程沒有像過去那樣短，所以我推薦大家可以的話盡量開啟自動更新

至於被更新什麼就關心我這邊的報導就好

開啟的設定的位置在後台更新管理處

更新內容如下

修正與部分IoT裝置的相容性問題

您可以透過路由器的後台更新

或是從底下這個連結下載手動更新

ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 https://dlcdnets.asus.com/pub/ASUS/wireless/ZenWiFi_ET12/FW_ZENWIFI_ET12_300610236602.zip?model=ZenWiFi%20Pro%20ET12

手動更新教學如下 (請注意更新時要認對新版本與路由器型號名)

下載 ZIP 檔後解壓縮在手動上傳便可，如果您跟我一樣在 AiMesh 系統中手動更新節點軔體則請跟著以下步驟走

系統管理 > 軔體更新

在 AiMesh 節點管理中點選手動軔體更新中的 上傳

(下圖中因為我更新完成才截圖，所以目前版本更最新版本變一樣了)

 

接下來會跳出準備被更新的路由器後台登入畫面~登入之後就會出現手動更新頁

點選 上傳

 

選擇你剛剛下載的新軔體

請一定要選對型號

另外

AC68U = AC66U+ B1

RT-AX3000 = RT-AX58U

 

然後保持被更新的路由器不斷電且與上傳檔案的電腦之間線路暢通，並靜待更新完成

 

100% 之後就可以使用了，但狐仔個人習慣是確定更新完成後會再重新啟動無線路由器一次

以上報告完畢，祝大家更新順利

  • MG HS 1.5T 旗艦版 純油二驅長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
  • [台南美食] 陳媽香辣棧 主打酥脆炸臭豆腐與配料豐富的臭豆腐鍋 簡單食記
  • BMW 320i Touring M Sport 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄
  • KYMCO RTS R 165 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
  • Ford KUGA MK3 原廠四輪定位參數紀錄

item.title: ASUS PRIME LC 360 ARGB LCD with Digital Display, Asetek Pump, and Universal Compatibility for All Motherboard Brands - Simple Unboxing
item.itunes:title: ASUS PRIME LC 360 ARGB LCD with Digital Display, Asetek Pump, and Universal Compatibility for All Motherboard Brands - Simple Unboxing
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
To read the Chinese version, please click here

Someone asked me which entry-level all-in-one (AIO) liquid cooler I recommend recently.

So, I want to show everyone

the entry-level AIO liquid cooler I’ve been using more often lately.

ASUS PRIME LC 360 ARGB LCD

It’s well-known that high-end CPUs in recent years generate a lot of heat.

Therefore, pairing a PC with an AIO liquid cooler has become a common setup.

As a result, I’ve been receiving more urgent requests for help with PCs lately.

Most cases of CPU overheating are due to choosing a low-grade AIO liquid cooler when purchasing the PC.

After prolonged use at high temperatures, the pump blades in the AIO cooler fail.

Even if hardware monitoring shows the pump’s RPM as normal, the CPU temperature skyrockets.

How hot can it get? Check the image below ~ A malfunctioning liquid cooler can heat the water inlet to the point where the paint bubbles.

In such cases, you have no choice but to replace it with a new one.

 

The main reasons I’ve been choosing this AIO cooler recently are:

1. A six-year warranty (though in most cases, people just buy a new one to get back online quickly).

2. Uses an Asetek pump.

3. The LCD digital display’s control software is extremely simple and compatible with motherboards from different brands.

 

Let’s take a quick look at some details of this AIO cooler.

The "360" in the product name indicates it’s a radiator with three 12cm fans arranged in a straight line.

 

The radiator has the "ASUS PRIME" branding on it.

 

The ARGB fans are connected in series via a circuit board.

So, when wiring, you only need to connect the fan’s 4-pin connector and a universal ARGB header.

For a 360mm AIO cooler, this reduces the number of cables by four, making cable management much simpler.

The fans have a maximum speed of 2500 RPM, a maximum airflow of 77.22 CFM, and a maximum static pressure of 5.48 mmH2O.

This allows the cooler to maximize performance without being too loud, keeping CPU temperatures well under control.

 

The most critical part of a cooler is the mounting bracket design ~ a good design makes installation easier and reduces the risk of errors.

This is the Intel mounting bracket, which is compatible with various socket types by adjusting the position of four screws.

It supports the latest LGA1851 all the way back to LGA115X.

 

The bracket also includes double-sided tape on the motherboard-facing side to aid installation.

 

The AMD setup is much simpler.

Just replace the AM4 or AM5 motherboard’s mounting bracket with this one.

Personally, I think this offers better stability and safety compared to Intel’s design.

 

This cable is very important.

The USB-C end connects to the water block, and the other end plugs into the motherboard’s USB 2.0 9-pin header.

The water block’s pump is from Asetek, widely regarded as the most durable brand for AIO liquid coolers.

The pump’s maximum speed is within 4000 RPM, powered through the motherboard’s 4-pin PWM header.

 

The LCD screen’s power and display data are provided via USB-C.

 

The LED on the water block can display several key performance metrics of the PC.

By default, it shows:

CPU or GPU temperature

CPU or GPU usage

CPU or GPU clock speed

 

When freshly installed, it’s normal to see all zeros, as shown below.

 

You need to download and install the utility software from ASUS’s official website.

Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver (click here to download)

 

Yes! Armoury Crate is only used for controlling ARGB.

But if your motherboard isn’t from ASUS, you only need to install the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver.

This is why I mentioned earlier that it works even with non-ASUS motherboards.

If you see the prompt below during the installation of the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver, don’t worry—just click the text in the yellow box.

 

Then you can proceed with the installation.

 

Once installed, you can find the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver icon in the system tray at the bottom right.

 

Right-click to see the settings options.

Besides selecting whether to display CPU or GPU information, you can also change the LED background scene in the red-boxed area.

There are three background theme styles, shown below for reference.

 

Although it doesn’t offer the customizable LED patterns found on ASUS’s high-end AIO coolers,

this simpler setup is actually more user-friendly for most people.

Of course, some might wonder which motherboard series is the most cost-effective to pair with this AIO cooler for a new PC build.

Do I even need to say it??? Obviously, it’s the ASUS PRIME series motherboards!

 

Let’s wrap things up.

After installing this AIO cooler on a PC with an i7-12700K (yes, the one where the previous cooler was heated to the point of bubbling paint),

I ran a benchmark with Monster Hunter.

With CPU usage around 40%, it maintained a stable 43°C (room temperature around 20°C), which is pretty good performance.

 

Currently priced under 4000, with a six-year warranty, a simple LED digital display, and an Asetek pump,

this seems like a great deal ~~~ Perfect for both budget new builds and upgrading old PCs with a new AIO cooler ~ Highly recommended!!!

That’s my brief report. Feel free to leave a comment or message the fan page for any discussions.

Taking the Brand Series to the Extreme: ASUS Launches the Prime Series AIO Liquid Cooler

click here to proceed or scan the QR CODE

The fans have a maximum speed of 2500 RPM, a maximum airflow of 77.22 CFM, and a maximum static pressure of 5.48 mmH2O.

This allows the cooler to maximize performance without being too loud, keeping CPU temperatures well under control.

 

The most critical part of a cooler is the mounting bracket design ~ a good design makes installation easier and reduces the risk of errors.

This is the Intel mounting bracket, which is compatible with various socket types by adjusting the position of four screws.

It supports the latest LGA1851 all the way back to LGA115X.

 

The bracket also includes double-sided tape on the motherboard-facing side to aid installation.

 

The AMD setup is much simpler.

Just replace the AM4 or AM5 motherboard’s mounting bracket with this one.

Personally, I think this offers better stability and safety compared to Intel’s design.

 

This cable is very important.

The USB-C end connects to the water block, and the other end plugs into the motherboard’s USB 2.0 9-pin header.

The water block’s pump is from Asetek, widely regarded as the most durable brand for AIO liquid coolers.

The pump’s maximum speed is within 4000 RPM, powered through the motherboard’s 4-pin PWM header.

 

The LCD screen’s power and display data are provided via USB-C.

 

The LED on the water block can display several key performance metrics of the PC.

By default, it shows:

CPU or GPU temperature

CPU or GPU usage

CPU or GPU clock speed

 

When freshly installed, it’s normal to see all zeros, as shown below.

 

You need to download and install the utility software from ASUS’s official website.

Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver (click here to download)

 

Yes! Armoury Crate is only used for controlling ARGB.

But if your motherboard isn’t from ASUS, you only need to install the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver.

This is why I mentioned earlier that it works even with non-ASUS motherboards.

If you see the prompt below during the installation of the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver, don’t worry—just click the text in the yellow box.

 

Then you can proceed with the installation.

 

Once installed, you can find the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver icon in the system tray at the bottom right.

 

Right-click to see the settings options.

Besides selecting whether to display CPU or GPU information, you can also change the LED background scene in the red-boxed area.

There are three background theme styles, shown below for reference.

 

Although it doesn’t offer the customizable LED patterns found on ASUS’s high-end AIO coolers,

this simpler setup is actually more user-friendly for most people.

Of course, some might wonder which motherboard series is the most cost-effective to pair with this AIO cooler for a new PC build.

Do I even need to say it??? Obviously, it’s the ASUS PRIME series motherboards!

 

Let’s wrap things up.

After installing this AIO cooler on a PC with an i7-12700K (yes, the one where the previous cooler was heated to the point of bubbling paint),

I ran a benchmark with Monster Hunter.

With CPU usage around 40%, it maintained a stable 43°C (room temperature around 20°C), which is pretty good performance.

 

Currently priced under 4000, with a six-year warranty, a simple LED digital display, and an Asetek pump,

this seems like a great deal ~~~ Perfect for both budget new builds and upgrading old PCs with a new AIO cooler ~ Highly recommended!!!

That’s my brief report. Feel free to leave a comment or message the fan page for any discussions.

item.content:encoded:
To read the Chinese version, please click here

Someone asked me which entry-level all-in-one (AIO) liquid cooler I recommend recently.

So, I want to show everyone

the entry-level AIO liquid cooler I’ve been using more often lately.

ASUS PRIME LC 360 ARGB LCD

It’s well-known that high-end CPUs in recent years generate a lot of heat.

Therefore, pairing a PC with an AIO liquid cooler has become a common setup.

As a result, I’ve been receiving more urgent requests for help with PCs lately.

Most cases of CPU overheating are due to choosing a low-grade AIO liquid cooler when purchasing the PC.

After prolonged use at high temperatures, the pump blades in the AIO cooler fail.

Even if hardware monitoring shows the pump’s RPM as normal, the CPU temperature skyrockets.

How hot can it get? Check the image below ~ A malfunctioning liquid cooler can heat the water inlet to the point where the paint bubbles.

In such cases, you have no choice but to replace it with a new one.

 

The main reasons I’ve been choosing this AIO cooler recently are:

1. A six-year warranty (though in most cases, people just buy a new one to get back online quickly).

2. Uses an Asetek pump.

3. The LCD digital display’s control software is extremely simple and compatible with motherboards from different brands.

 

Let’s take a quick look at some details of this AIO cooler.

The "360" in the product name indicates it’s a radiator with three 12cm fans arranged in a straight line.

 

The radiator has the "ASUS PRIME" branding on it.

 

The ARGB fans are connected in series via a circuit board.

So, when wiring, you only need to connect the fan’s 4-pin connector and a universal ARGB header.

For a 360mm AIO cooler, this reduces the number of cables by four, making cable management much simpler.

The fans have a maximum speed of 2500 RPM, a maximum airflow of 77.22 CFM, and a maximum static pressure of 5.48 mmH2O.

This allows the cooler to maximize performance without being too loud, keeping CPU temperatures well under control.

 

The most critical part of a cooler is the mounting bracket design ~ a good design makes installation easier and reduces the risk of errors.

This is the Intel mounting bracket, which is compatible with various socket types by adjusting the position of four screws.

It supports the latest LGA1851 all the way back to LGA115X.

 

The bracket also includes double-sided tape on the motherboard-facing side to aid installation.

 

The AMD setup is much simpler.

Just replace the AM4 or AM5 motherboard’s mounting bracket with this one.

Personally, I think this offers better stability and safety compared to Intel’s design.

 

This cable is very important.

The USB-C end connects to the water block, and the other end plugs into the motherboard’s USB 2.0 9-pin header.

The water block’s pump is from Asetek, widely regarded as the most durable brand for AIO liquid coolers.

The pump’s maximum speed is within 4000 RPM, powered through the motherboard’s 4-pin PWM header.

 

The LCD screen’s power and display data are provided via USB-C.

 

The LED on the water block can display several key performance metrics of the PC.

By default, it shows:

CPU or GPU temperature

CPU or GPU usage

CPU or GPU clock speed

 

When freshly installed, it’s normal to see all zeros, as shown below.

 

You need to download and install the utility software from ASUS’s official website.

Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver (click here to download)

 

Yes! Armoury Crate is only used for controlling ARGB.

But if your motherboard isn’t from ASUS, you only need to install the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver.

This is why I mentioned earlier that it works even with non-ASUS motherboards.

If you see the prompt below during the installation of the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver, don’t worry—just click the text in the yellow box.

 

Then you can proceed with the installation.

 

Once installed, you can find the Prime LC 360 ARGB LCD Driver icon in the system tray at the bottom right.

 

Right-click to see the settings options.

Besides selecting whether to display CPU or GPU information, you can also change the LED background scene in the red-boxed area.

There are three background theme styles, shown below for reference.

 

Although it doesn’t offer the customizable LED patterns found on ASUS’s high-end AIO coolers,

this simpler setup is actually more user-friendly for most people.

Of course, some might wonder which motherboard series is the most cost-effective to pair with this AIO cooler for a new PC build.

Do I even need to say it??? Obviously, it’s the ASUS PRIME series motherboards!

 

Let’s wrap things up.

After installing this AIO cooler on a PC with an i7-12700K (yes, the one where the previous cooler was heated to the point of bubbling paint),

I ran a benchmark with Monster Hunter.

With CPU usage around 40%, it maintained a stable 43°C (room temperature around 20°C), which is pretty good performance.

 

Currently priced under 4000, with a six-year warranty, a simple LED digital display, and an Asetek pump,

this seems like a great deal ~~~ Perfect for both budget new builds and upgrading old PCs with a new AIO cooler ~ Highly recommended!!!

That’s my brief report. Feel free to leave a comment or message the fan page for any discussions.

Taking the Brand Series to the Extreme: ASUS Launches the Prime Series AIO Liquid Cooler

item.title: MG HS 1.5T 旗艦版 純油二驅長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
item.itunes:title: MG HS 1.5T 旗艦版 純油二驅長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
去年的年底 ~ 我們記錄中的 MG HS 1.5T 糟到政府的政策鐵拳重擊銷量銳減

(因自製率條款被限制出貨，今年重新回到車市戰場)

但這不妨礙已經在我們手中的這一部車快速累積里程數

MG HS 1.5T 旗艦版 純油二驅長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2024 年版

從上面 2024 年的結算來看，去年六月底交車 ~ 半年的時間內

跑了約 17000 公里，總平均油耗為 11.132KM/L

今年應該可以順利跑出跟我的苦瓜一樣的 35000 ~ 40000 公里

開始前還是要先跟各位宣告一下

這部 MG HS 1.5T 旗艦版 是此系列最入門的款示

為 1500 cc 渦輪引擎，前輪驅動

沒有油電混合系統，也沒有 AWD 四輪驅動系統

官方油耗紀錄為

市區油耗 10.99 km/ltr
高速油耗 15.59 km/ltr
平均油耗 13.50 km/ltr

接著 ~ 我把紀錄表換成新版來方便大家觀看

(點我前往)

今年開始會把幾次小補油的部份累積到後面某一次加滿油之後再一次性統計

所以實際油耗紀錄會比去年準確不少

今年想買這部車的朋友應該會很有參考價值

現在開始了

1/06

這次有部份去年沒有加滿油的部份補滿，所以油耗參考一下就好

加油 59.8 L / 1793 元

行駛里程數 17342 - 16953 = 389

加油記錄油耗 6.51 km/L

 

 

01/10

這次開始的實際油耗就準了

加油 50.1 L / 1510 元

行駛里程數 17921-17342 = 579

加油記錄油耗 6.51 km/L

 

01/20

加油 54.9 L / 1702 元

行駛里程數 18525-17921 = 604

加油記錄油耗 11 km/L

 

02/03

加油 118.55 L / 3678 元

行駛里程數 19912-18525 = 1387

加油記錄油耗 11.67 km/L

 

2/10

加油 70.85 L / 2194 元

行駛里程數 20735-19912 = 823

加油記錄油耗 11.62 km/L

02/17

2 萬公里保養啦

進場里程為 21662 KM / 3907 元

然後大家還記得網紅沙西米的 HS 漏水的事嗎 ?

原因是天窗排水孔塞住 ~ 所以我們這邊加進了天窗保養清潔，要價 300

讓原廠以後少一個天窗漏水的理由可以賴

 

然後加滿油

加油 63.25 L / 2541 元

行駛里程數 21706-20735 = 971

加油記錄油耗 15.35 km/L

02/24

加油 46.81 L / 1465 元

行駛里程數 22279-21706 = 573

加油記錄油耗 12.24 km/L

02/27

加油 50.36 L / 1576 元

行駛里程數 22952-22279 = 673

加油記錄油耗 13.36 km/L

 

03/10

加油 55.97 L / 1724 元

行駛里程數 23586 - 22952 = 634

加油記錄油耗 11.33 km/L

 

03/24

加油 110.54 L / 3368 元

行駛里程數 24857 - 23586 = 1271

加油記錄油耗 11.50 km/L

 

03/27

加油 43.82 L / 1332 元

行駛里程數 25418 - 24857  = 561

加油記錄油耗 12.8 km/L

 

04/07

加油 58.01 L / 1749 元

行駛里程數 650KM

加油記錄油耗 11.2 km/L

 

04/11

加油 46.88 L / 1420 元

行駛里程數 557 KM

加油記錄油耗 11.88 km/L

 

04/16

加油 50.3 L / 1479 元

行駛里程數 623 KM

加油記錄油耗 12.39 km/L

04/24

加油 64.33 L / 1901 元

行駛里程數 736 KM

加油記錄油耗 11.44 km/L

 

04/30

因為還沒加滿，所以今天加油的部份先放著沒加進紀錄

 

目前實際總油耗 11.34 KM/L

item.title: [台南美食] 陳媽香辣棧 主打酥脆炸臭豆腐與配料豐富的臭豆腐鍋 簡單食記
item.itunes:title: [台南美食] 陳媽香辣棧 主打酥脆炸臭豆腐與配料豐富的臭豆腐鍋 簡單食記
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
台南有蠻多家頗好吃的臭豆腐專賣店

雖然一般來說這些店家都會有炸臭豆腐與臭豆腐鍋可以選

但大多比較受到網民追捧的都是以炸臭豆腐為主打的店家

比如 : [台南美食] 夏林路臭豆腐 到台南必吃的排隊名店

今天我來分享一間我認為臭豆腐鍋的表現極佳的一家店給大家

先給店家資料

陳媽香辣棧

台南市南區健康路一段441號

16:00 ~ 22:00

這家店的位置就在西門路與健康路小北百貨的旁邊

如果你開車前往的話，推薦你把車停在小北斜對面的停車場內會比較安全

半露天的場地，沒有冷氣 ~ 但因為只在夜間營業，所以在強力電扇的加持之下應該也還好

菜單很簡單，看這張看版

 

來看看我吃了些什麼

大家一定要比一下的炸臭豆腐

這個是小份的 55 元一份

店家把它炸到連最裡面都酥了 ~ 喜歡吃酥脆感的人肯定會喜歡

醬料給的比較偏醬油膏加進蔥花，老實講不錯吃

硬要說缺點的話就是泡菜給的少了些

但我們可以加點泡菜

 

然後我很推的豆腐鍋

可以看到店加連小魚干都加進去了，吃起來鮮味十足

是我近期吃到最好吃的

然後要提醒大家，這家的鍋會勾芡來增加滑口感

如果你不喜歡的話，記得跟老闆說一下

基本上這家的口味我覺得蠻好的

價格也算是時價，可以讓你好好吃一餐

然後這一家的白飯是要加點的，大家特別注意一下就好

[台南美食] 李桑飯店 保安店 保安路上小餐館 新菜色 鹹酥雞便當小試食記

[台南美食] 達也濱家漁場 藏身水仙宮市場的日式料理店 生魚片處理技巧很棒 ~ 大推

[台南美食] 阿美純手工麻糬 便宜、大顆、餡飽滿、超好吃 總是大排長龍的古早味甜點店

[台南] 七誠米粿 國華街上近水仙宮市場的名店 但是..... 簡單食記

[台南美食] 碳烤烏魚子 藏身在永樂市場二樓 露天碳火直烤 香嫩好吃

如果您想贊助提神良方，鼓勵編輯部更努力 (低銷 50)

可以點我前往 或是掃 QR CODE

想要跟我們聊天，請加入傻瓜狐狸的粉絲團

傻瓜狐狸的狐言亂語

原文發表於傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品

item.title: BMW 320i Touring M Sport 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄
item.itunes:title: BMW 320i Touring M Sport 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
好朋友說我這樣開一篇文來紀錄車的使用狀況實在很有趣，所以決定也要加入

因此我們迎來這部成交價邁進 200 萬等級的車

BMW 320i Touring M Sport

紀錄方式完全以朋友方便為主，所以主要的數字會是油耗與保養開銷上

主要活動地點為天龍國境內且行車習慣每人都不一樣，所以數字僅供參考

工作日：

新店來回新北兩趟
新店來回內湖三趟

假日 :

就開著車到處去 <<< 可能會去殺山路

當然了，如果驚訝於怎麼會跟想像中的不一樣可以來留言請教

開始之前我們先將官方油耗數字給放在底下

市區油耗 11.41km/ltr

高速油耗 15.65km/ltr

平均油耗 13.8km/ltr

 

上路的實際記錄朋友把它做成表格自行更新

想看表格的朋友~我把它放進雲端了

(點我前往)

 

朋友因為工作的關系，所以很難一直上傳加油紀錄給我

因為所有的加油紀錄就看表格就好

網頁版這邊就只紀錄一些較大項的支出

比如保養工單與改裝品安裝

10/1

九月份交車到現在來看帥帥的夜間照來整結囉

詳細內容可見上頭的雲端 EXCEL

到目前為止

電腦油耗 13.2 KM/L

實際油耗 12.471 KM/L

 

11/5

十月的整結來囉

詳細內容可見上頭的雲端 EXCEL

到目前為止

電腦油耗 12.9 KM/L

實際油耗 12.377 KM/L

 

11/20

表格更新樣式

現在表頭呈現的資訊更多元了

 

12/23

第一次保養的工單來了 ~ 11822 公里進廠

BMW 的費用其實不算貴耶

到目前為止

電腦油耗 13.100 KM/L

實際油耗 12.378 KM/L

 

2/10

這個冬天太冷 ~ 開車去中油買煤油回家燒

接著 ~ 這是一月的總結

電腦油耗 13.100 KM/L

實際油耗 12.595 KM/L

 

03/07

二月總結來囉

電腦油耗 13.700 KM/L

實際油耗 12.646 KM/L

 

04/01

這圖是車主在

鱷魚島觀景平台

三月總結來囉

有跑了趟北高來回，油耗漂亮許多

電腦油耗 13.700 KM/L

實際油耗 13.231 KM/L

 

05/05

四月總結來了

在這個月遇到兇起來連自己都怕的 TOYOTA 車

電腦油耗 12.687 KM/L

實際油耗 13.1 KM/L

 

持續更新

item.title: Ford KUGA MK3 原廠四輪定位參數紀錄
item.itunes:title: Ford KUGA MK3 原廠四輪定位參數紀錄
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
因為我這 KUGA MK3 的車主累積里程數的速度有點快

Ford Kuga MK3 EcoBoost 180 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

所以輪胎的損耗速度自然也快了一些

日前在八萬公理前後也換了一套新的輪胎 

飛隼 FALKEN ZIEX CT60 A/S 225/60R18 簡單開箱與使用紀錄

雖然該店家會進行四輪定位啦 ~ 但我還是覺得原廠的數據還是稍核對一下會比較對味

因此我把 01 的 阿福大 幫忙找出來的原廠設定數據給轉錄在這邊

未來我應該會每五萬公里會對自己的車四輪定位一次

以避免輪胎發生吃胎或跳花的情況，可以最大程度的延長輪胎的使用壽命

在這邊再次感謝 阿福的網宅II 提供的資料

未來我會要求四輪定位店家依這些數據調整

前輪的部份

 

後輪的部份

 

以上留存 ~ 希望可以幫到各位車友 (理論上 KUGA MK3.5 應該也通用)

Ford Kuga MK3 在車輛行駛間右後座發出異響的免成本解決方式

Ford Kuga MK3 ecoboost 180 水幫浦漏水辨認說明與保固內更換紀錄

HONDA CR-V MK6 1.5T Prestige 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄

Ford Kuga MK3.5 1.5T Active 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

KYMCO RTS R 165 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

item.title: [高雄岡山美食] 松泰羊肉店 岡山老字號溫體羊肉店 量多美味 大推薦
item.itunes:title: [高雄岡山美食] 松泰羊肉店 岡山老字號溫體羊肉店 量多美味 大推薦
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
在岡山的羊肉店有使用冷凍羊肉或溫體羊肉的差別

有些人對於這方面比較有要求，所以就會跑來問我這個岡山人都吃哪一家溫體羊肉店

對於這個我得先說 ~ 每個人的喜好都有所不同，但如果你有心的話可都試著刷過一次再決定

但如果你想跟著我這個已經刷過幾次的人來選的話 ~ 那你可以從我的首選開始

松泰羊肉店

高雄市岡山區公園西路三段66號

11:00~15:00 / 17:00~20:00

這家店門口的停車位可以放四部車

如果停滿了，對面也沒空間就往前峰國小的方向去找吧

 

菜單如下

大家參考一下 ~~

我個人推薦的點法是有多少成年人就點多少道中份量的就好

 

第一次來不知道該吃些什麼的話，可以跟著我來點

我在這邊點的都是中份的，大家可以看到後面的牙籤罐就能知道這份量其實不少

如果你到店人數不多或食量不大的話，就不用點大份的了

這是涼拌羊肚

店家的調味在岡山的羊肉中算是口味中間略重一點點

但酸菜的酸味有被輕輕帶出，不會太酸口不會搶走羊肉的風味

肉切片的厚度不錯 ~ 咬起來會有嚼感且份量頗大

輔以大量的薑絲再加上是溫體羊肉，因此不用怕羊騷味喔

 

然後來份蔥爆羊肉

肉片厚實口感好

大量的蔥段與洋蔥一起大火快炒，香嫩好吃

感吃苦瓜的話，那肯定要來一份苦瓜羊肉的

店家加進不少小魚乾一起炒，味道很棒

 

然後是我個人最愛的酸菜羊肉

松泰的酸菜的酸味是比較淡的

因此怕酸的朋友應該都能順利入口開吃，且你還會發現很好吃 !!!

 

然後再來一碗羊肉片湯 ~ 這樣四個成年人應該就很足夠吃了

我手滑拍失焦了，就不多解說

 

至於要不要點炒飯類就看個人

我是建議白飯就好 ~ 這樣一桌下來 1500 ，四大一小吃到飽嘟嘟，很可以啦 ~ 大推

[高雄岡山美食] 永記酵素臭豆腐 極致酥脆外層加上鬆軟內餡的好味道 ~ 不容錯過

[高雄美食] 岡山煎炒蛋麵 簡單就是美味 只在平日中午可以吃到的排隊小店

[高雄] Twomi Coffee 貳喵珈琲 擁有兩隻店貓與好喝咖啡 ～ 近岡山火車站的手沖咖啡店

[高雄美食] WOW 的店 ~ 藏身岡山區石螺潭的超美味法式緞帶可頌一定要吃

[高雄岡山美食] 出自眷村的美味 嘉讚外省麵 湖南常德道地美食

item.title: [改裝日記] KYMCO RTS R 165 改裝 MD 摩德舒適坐墊及自動彈起座墊鉸鏈(含坐墊強化)
item.itunes:title: [改裝日記] KYMCO RTS R 165 改裝 MD 摩德舒適坐墊及自動彈起座墊鉸鏈(含坐墊強化)
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
說起 KYMCO RTS R 165 這台車，優點不少，缺點也明顯可見

不過話說是缺點，不如說是整台車設定的太過運動取向

所以呢!! 懸吊過硬，然後坐墊也過硬.....所以在市區騎乘實在是不太舒適

如果常常在騎乘山路可能會覺得整個懸吊和椅墊的支撐性不錯

但....在市區真的不舒服，長途也是虐待自己的屁股

所以就開始有了修改坐墊的念頭，剛好在網路上看到 Moder 摩德摩托精品 有推出相關產品

再前往試坐後就下訂預購了，大概經過一個月的等待

接下來就是簡單介紹 

MD 摩德舒適坐墊

藉由廠商的介紹讓大家了解一下這款坐墊的特點

•📌全新開模設計”高密度乳膠泡棉“有效吸收震動,柔軟舒適且保有一定的支撐性,讓你通勤和跑山換位都可以輕鬆應對

•📌騎乘三角優化提升包覆性 改善原廠坐墊往前滑,加大乘坐空間

•📌獨家流線造型設計跟隨車身造型融為一體,不會有厚重感,完美俐落呈現

•📌質感跑格類麂皮高伸縮性,止滑效果提升,防水材質

•📌精緻字繡工藝立體質感,美觀搶眼

換裝完之後最有感的其實是整個屁股不會再一直往前滑

應該跟泡棉這段支撐住兩腿之間的設計有關

坐墊內側有封版

這樣的缺點是讓坐墊的空間變小了一點，原本可能原本放得下的安全帽會放不下

但....反正鞭擊 老G 原本就不會把安全帽放在車廂裡面了，這倒是無所謂

給各位有想要改裝的車友做為參考

 

目前訂購可以透過 官方FB 進行訂購，或者直接到 FB 看各區合作經銷商進行訂做

細節上繡字的顏色以及縫線的顏色都是可以選擇的

另外坐墊的價格可以分為以原廠交換或者是買斷制，目前的價格是 $3300，買斷多+ $1500

至於鞭擊 老G 購入的價格是預購優惠價，當初可是試坐完就果斷下定了

官方的服務據點在高雄仁武，南部的朋友有興趣可以和老闆預約後直接到現場

換上自己的車試乘後是最準確的，畢竟每個人的乘坐需求和體驗可能是完全不同的

總之，現在鞭擊 老G 是非常滿意，長途騎乘到布袋參加車聚也完全不會屁股疼痛 !!

 

另外同場加映坐墊安裝自動彈起座墊鉸鏈的改裝

畢竟過去在騎乘G5的時代就覺得有坐墊自動開啟是很方便的

但....這次 KYMCO RTS R 165 原廠並沒有搭載這個功能

那~~我們就自己來 DIY 改裝吧!!

需要購入的彈起座墊鉸鏈在蝦皮都可以簡單購入，基本上就是跟 G6 同款

但由於設計還是不太相同，所以也有商家開發 椅墊強化固定片

避免未來鉸鏈的固定點會很容易裂開

這是在蝦皮購入的自動彈起座墊鉸鏈，跟 G6 不一樣的是坐墊缺乏紅圈的兩個固定栓

 

這是同樣在蝦皮上購入的椅墊強化固定片

這樣未來就不太需要擔心彈起力道過大造成塑膠裂開

但由於原本的設計安裝自動彈起座墊鉸鏈會造成紅圈下方那兩個鎖點干涉

所以自己加工了紅色圓圈這兩個孔洞

 

這樣一來 RTS 坐墊上沒有螺栓的這兩個點就可以用螺絲鎖入

  

另外在車廂的這個位置同樣安裝了強化鐵片

但由於 KYMCO RTS R 165 在這個位置原本是沒有掛鉤了

所以購入的強化鐵片版本是選擇有掛鉤的(商家也有販售沒掛鉤的版本)

 

鎖上兩個固定螺絲後再鎖上鉸鏈即可

 

這樣椅墊前方就多兩個掛勾可以掛東西了

鞭擊 老G 個人是覺得這樣可以掛的東西就變多了

至少短程出們買個便當或飲料就很方便

 

以上簡單介紹本次的改裝紀錄

未來我們還會繼續記錄各種車輛的改裝及改善

KYMCO RTS R 165 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

BMW 320i Touring M Sport 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄

Ford KUGA MK3 原廠四輪定位參數紀錄

[高雄岡山美食] 松泰羊肉店 岡山老字號溫體羊肉店 量多美味 大推薦

Cooling Factor CFW120M 120mm PWM Fan Unboxing Review
item.description:
說起 KYMCO RTS R 165 這台車，優點不少，缺點也明顯可見

不過話說是缺點，不如說是整台車設定的太過運動取向

所以呢!! 懸吊過硬，然後坐墊也過硬.....所以在市區騎乘實在是不太舒適

如果常常在騎乘山路可能會覺得整個懸吊和椅墊的支撐性不錯

但....在市區真的不舒服，長途也是虐待自己的屁股

所以就開始有了修改坐墊的念頭，剛好在網路上看到 Moder 摩德摩托精品 有推出相關產品

再前往試坐後就下訂預購了，大概經過一個月的等待

接下來就是簡單介紹 

MD 摩德舒適坐墊

藉由廠商的介紹讓大家了解一下這款坐墊的特點

•📌全新開模設計”高密度乳膠泡棉“有效吸收震動,柔軟舒適且保有一定的支撐性,讓你通勤和跑山換位都可以輕鬆應對

•📌騎乘三角優化提升包覆性 改善原廠坐墊往前滑,加大乘坐空間

•📌獨家流線造型設計跟隨車身造型融為一體,不會有厚重感,完美俐落呈現

•📌質感跑格類麂皮高伸縮性,止滑效果提升,防水材質

•📌精緻字繡工藝立體質感,美觀搶眼

換裝完之後最有感的其實是整個屁股不會再一直往前滑

應該跟泡棉這段支撐住兩腿之間的設計有關

坐墊內側有封版

這樣的缺點是讓坐墊的空間變小了一點，原本可能原本放得下的安全帽會放不下

但....反正鞭擊 老G 原本就不會把安全帽放在車廂裡面了，這倒是無所謂

給各位有想要改裝的車友做為參考

 

目前訂購可以透過 官方FB 進行訂購，或者直接到 FB 看各區合作經銷商進行訂做

細節上繡字的顏色以及縫線的顏色都是可以選擇的

另外坐墊的價格可以分為以原廠交換或者是買斷制，目前的價格是 $3300，買斷多+ $1500

至於鞭擊 老G 購入的價格是預購優惠價，當初可是試坐完就果斷下定了

官方的服務據點在高雄仁武，南部的朋友有興趣可以和老闆預約後直接到現場

換上自己的車試乘後是最準確的，畢竟每個人的乘坐需求和體驗可能是完全不同的

總之，現在鞭擊 老G 是非常滿意，長途騎乘到布袋參加車聚也完全不會屁股疼痛 !!

 

另外同場加映坐墊安裝自動彈起座墊鉸鏈的改裝

畢竟過去在騎乘G5的時代就覺得有坐墊自動開啟是很方便的

但....這次 KYMCO RTS R 165 原廠並沒有搭載這個功能

那~~我們就自己來 DIY 改裝吧!!

需要購入的彈起座墊鉸鏈在蝦皮都可以簡單購入，基本上就是跟 G6 同款

但由於設計還是不太相同，所以也有商家開發 椅墊強化固定片

避免未來鉸鏈的固定點會很容易裂開

這是在蝦皮購入的自動彈起座墊鉸鏈，跟 G6 不一樣的是坐墊缺乏紅圈的兩個固定栓

 

這是同樣在蝦皮上購入的椅墊強化固定片

這樣未來就不太需要擔心彈起力道過大造成塑膠裂開

但由於原本的設計安裝自動彈起座墊鉸鏈會造成紅圈下方那兩個鎖點干涉

所以自己加工了紅色圓圈這兩個孔洞

 

這樣一來 RTS 坐墊上沒有螺栓的這兩個點就可以用螺絲鎖入

  

另外在車廂的這個位置同樣安裝了強化鐵片

但由於 KYMCO RTS R 165 在這個位置原本是沒有掛鉤了

所以購入的強化鐵片版本是選擇有掛鉤的(商家也有販售沒掛鉤的版本)

 

鎖上兩個固定螺絲後再鎖上鉸鏈即可

 

這樣椅墊前方就多兩個掛勾可以掛東西了

鞭擊 老G 個人是覺得這樣可以掛的東西就變多了

至少短程出們買個便當或飲料就很方便

 

以上簡單介紹本次的改裝紀錄

未來我們還會繼續記錄各種車輛的改裝及改善

KYMCO RTS R 165 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

BMW 320i Touring M Sport 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄

Ford KUGA MK3 原廠四輪定位參數紀錄

[高雄岡山美食] 松泰羊肉店 岡山老字號溫體羊肉店 量多美味 大推薦

Cooling Factor CFW120M 120mm PWM Fan Unboxing Review

item.title: TOYOTA TOWN ACE 系列車型 被招回修正這兩個問題
item.itunes:title: TOYOTA TOWN ACE 系列車型 被招回修正這兩個問題
item.itunes:author: 傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
TOYOTA 在台的代理商 和泰汽車在日前 ( 4 月 26 日 )

對其 TOYOTA TOWN ACE 木床 (PICK-UP小貨車) 系列車型 發出兩項招回通知

通知將以掛號信的方式發出

如果您的車輛在底下招回通知的時間區段內生產，但並未收到信件

請聯繫您的 TOYOTA 服務專員詢問

招回通知內容為底下兩項

項目一

TOWN ACE電瓶固定裝置瑕疵召回

召回對象為 2022年1月至2024年12月生產區間之部分TOYOTA TOWN ACE 貨卡 TSS 頂規車型

由於電瓶固定裝置強度不足，車輛在遭遇後方車輛撞擊時，車載電瓶可能會過度移動，導致電瓶樁頭有可能會與車體接觸，最嚴重狀況，可能發生火災風險，影響行車安全

自2025年4月28日起展開，以掛號信函通知顧客回廠實施免費更換電瓶固定裝置改善品，作業時間約需0.5小時

項目二

TOWN ACE木床車型第一橫樑及起動馬達瑕疵召修

召回對象為 2022年1月至2023年3月生產區間之部分TOYOTA TOWN ACE 木床 (PICK-UP小貨車)系列車型

於木床貨斗曝露於開放的室外環境，且在無遮蔽的條件下，水/液體將易聚集於車頭與貨斗之間，透過橫樑上的排水口集中滴落於引擎起動馬達

長期使用下馬達內部可能發生鏽蝕，而導致起動馬達故障

若起動馬達發生故障時，車輛停於紅綠燈前方，且引擎自動啟閉系統作動後，車輛將無法再啟動而受困於路中

自2025年4月28日起，以掛號信函通知顧客回廠實施免費檢査，必要時更換「起動馬達」及「木床第1橫樑」，作業時間約需1.7小時

家裡有文中車型的朋友要記得多注意一下

Honda Civic e:HEV 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

Ford Kuga MK3 EcoBoost 180 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

HONDA CR-V MK6 1.5T Prestige 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄

Ford Kuga MK3.5 1.5T Active 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

KYMCO RTS R 165 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版

如果您想贊助提神良方，鼓勵編輯部更努力 (低銷 50)

可以點我前往 或是掃 QR CODE

想要跟我們聊天，請加入傻瓜狐狸的粉絲團

傻瓜狐狸的狐言亂語

原文發表於傻瓜狐狸的雜碎物品

召回對象為 2022年1月至2023年3月生產區間之部分TOYOTA TOWN ACE 木床 (PICK-UP小貨車)系列車型

於木床貨斗曝露於開放的室外環境，且在無遮蔽的條件下，水/液體將易聚集於車頭與貨斗之間，透過橫樑上的排水口集中滴落於引擎起動馬達

長期使用下馬達內部可能發生鏽蝕，而導致起動馬達故障

若起動馬達發生故障時，車輛停於紅綠燈前方，且引擎自動啟閉系統作動後，車輛將無法再啟動而受困於路中

自2025年4月28日起，以掛號信函通知顧客回廠實施免費檢査，必要時更換「起動馬達」及「木床第1橫樑」，作業時間約需1.7小時

家裡有文中車型的朋友要記得多注意一下

Ford Kuga MK3 EcoBoost 180 長期油耗與養護成本紀錄 2025 年版
